title: Añejo Restaurant
description: 2-floor haunt with folk art & a hip vibe offering creative Mexican eats & an expansive tequila list.
address: 2116 4 St SW #2, Calgary, AB T2S 1W7, Canada
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by this business 1 week ago

questionsAndAnswers.question: Does anemia restaurant serve margaritas on ice cubes?

answers.answer: Definitely yes, you can check my pictures I uploaded

reviews.text: Great experience with the team at Anejo - professional, timely service and responses to our questions.  We had an amazing staff event - a perfect venue with amazing food and service for any corporate lunches or staff events!
Bella was great! Margs were amazing.

Bella is emanating a feel good energy with great communication!

Go Habs Go!

reviewContext.Dietary restrictions: Gluten free options!

reviews.text: Amazing food and service! Ricardo as awesome.
Delicious food, great selection of margaritas and very helpful and informative staff. A favorite place
Came with a friend and our server Lynn was so welcoming and had a great knowledge of the menus! Be back soon :)
Excelente lugar para celebrar el cumpleaños, buena comida y buena bebida.
reviews.textTranslated: Great place to celebrate a birthday, great food and great drinks.

reviews.text: Was here Oct 18 and seated at the bar. Matthew was fantastic and recommended both the mussels and molcajete de carne. The latter when had with the assorted proteins was incredible. We encountered a bit of a blunder with one of our dishes and both him and Mike the GM went above and beyond. Thank you both for a great evening and impeccable service. Will be back.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.text: Always amazing food and service. I am celiac and they always take extra precautions

Anejo was a great place to go for a date night ! Ricardo provided exceptional service, and the atmosphere was fun and full of energy.
Will definitely dine here again.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.text: Lissette and Bella were awesome!!!!! Service and the food was great. Thank you :)

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.text: Bella & Lissette were our servers and they did a fantastic job. We love Anejo and they made our experience extra special. Thank you! Highly recommended to all.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk
reviewContext.Group size: 3-4 people, Suitable for all group sizes

reviews.text:
As a self-proclaimed connoisseur of dining experiences (and someone who worked in a restaurant for 8 years) I can say with confidence that Lissette operates on a higher plane.
Timing? Impeccable. Charm? Off the charts. Drink recommendations? Life-changing.
If Michelin stars were based on personality, she’d have a constellation named after her.

Food was excellent and I have to say service was over the top. We had a new server whom was very personable and entertaining. He was there the moment we needed anything. The food was top notch and I would not hesitate to recommend. Update the servers name was Sunny, give him some love if you visit.
Amazing.
Amazing location for Mexican food. Love the atmosphere and their happy hour specials here!

Absolutely loved this place! 🥑
The guacamole was the best I’ve ever had — so fresh and flavorful!
The steak was perfection, juicy and delicious 😋
And you have to try the lemon pie and the guava margarita (it was my first time trying it, and wow — so good! 💛)
Great vibes and service — can’t wait to come back!

reviewContext.Recommended dishes: Churros, Tableside Guacamole, House Salsa Tasting, Tortillas, Guacamole, Chicken Tacos, Strawberry Rhubarb

reviews.text: Anna was phenomenal, obviously very good at what she does, and we got the bonus of having Sonny (not sure of spelling, Sunny?) serving us as well: front of house in training… you’re in great hands with either. AND we accidentally came at happy hour and the prices were great. Good on y’all!
Perfect as always. Good energy, not to loud, not to quiet. Perfect tacos and top grade Margs.
Sunny is very friendly and very hospitalized. Amazing experience to be served by him . Dishes are also amazing.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk
reviewContext.Dietary restrictions: No cilantro

reviews.text: Sunny is amazing! He is such a good guy for serving.We had a nice talk with him 🫶🏻

One of the best happy hour deals in town. Daily from 3–5 PM and again 9 PM to close, you get half-price tequila and mezcal (yes, even top shelf), $4 classic tacos, and $7 margaritas and select beers. Lively vibe, great for groups, and the tacos hold up. Go early as it fills fast.
Everything was great, but I left without a buzz…maybe our second margaritas were missing the tequila???

The food was great. Specially liked the guacamole and chips starter, pretty cool how they make the guacamole in front of you. We went during brunch and sat outside close the street, it wasn't as comfortable because the sitting and the umbrellas were just poorly positioned. The staff was very friendly and the quality of the food was great.

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Alicia,

Thank you for the great review.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

Hola Crystal,

Cheers!

reviews.text: I loved the place absolutely beautiful. The atmosphere amazing. I was taking photos of the bar and the bartenders posed for them as well. They were amazing. Our server cami was an absolute delight. Sweetest human ever. He was patient, kind, and helped me through all my questions without making me feel like an Idoit. If this girl don’t get a raise I don’t know how anyone else deserves it. I can’t wait to come back and see her, and the food. Oh yes the food was perfect. Best Mexican food iv had in suchhh a longtime. Great place to eat and have fun.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Eva,

Thank you for the great review, we are very happy to hear that you had a great time and enjoyed the food, atmosphere and service. I know Cami will be happy to hear that you had a fantastic time, and our bartenders are always ready for a photo op!!

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: The food was spectacular and our server, Cami was absolutely amazing even after a long shift. Gave recommendations and answered all our questions with a great attitude!  100/10
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Peter,

Thank you for taking the time to leave us a great review. Cami is one of our best and I am sure she will be happy to hear about your review.

Cheers!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:

reviews.text:
Showed up at 430pm this Sunday, was told that they only had two servers and they were overwhelmed, to come back another day.
Went and had a drink else where, came back. Stood at the entrance awkwardly while two staff discussed if they could accommodate us. Not a good feeling.
Ukrainian bartender made our night with his fast friendly service. Told us to come straight to the bar next time. 10/10 for him.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Cameron,

I am very sorry to hear this was your experience upon arriving here. I was here on Sunday and in no way, shape or form did I give the ok to turn anyone away. While we may have been short staffed, it is our job to make sure that doesn't effect you in a negative way. There are ways that we could have handled this better, we could have let you know that we were very busy and that service might be a little slower than usual but we still should have taken care of you and because we dropped the ball you have my sincerest apologies. If you would be so kind as to email me at gm.4thst@anejo.ca, I would like to get some more information about this interaction and try to make this up to you. I look forward to hearing from you.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text:
Had a nice supper here but when the bill came, the server had already added a 20% gratuity for a party of 3.
He also never mentioned this and there is, of course, an auto prompt for tip.
Very sketchy. Double check your bill if you are eating here.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Robin,

I am very disheartened to hear this. We have strict rules on this and if this happened it will be dealt with swiftly. If you can reach out to me via email at your earliest convenience at gm.4thst@anejo.ca I would really appreciate the opportunity to get some more information from you and a copy of the bill. 

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

Hola DVV,

Thank you for the review!

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: Our server, Ricardo, was super helpful, friendly, and quick. The decor, music, and general atmosphere is fun and the food was deeelicious. Will definitely come back! I also loved that we didn’t have to yell to be able to hear each other (it was 5:30pm on a Wednesday).

reviews.text:
We celebrated our first anniversary at this restaurant, and it was absolutely amazing!
The food was incredibly delicious, and the service was top-notch. Special thanks to Joe – he gave us so much attention, helped us choose both dinner and drinks. The strawberry tequila and lemon pie were the highlights of the night!

A big thank you as well to our server Camry for her care and attention.
You guys truly deserve all 5 stars – your service won us over. Highly recommend!
I promise to recommend you to my friends, and we will definitely be back. The level of service is something I haven’t seen in Calgary for a long time. It’s clear that this place is truly customer-focused.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Мария,

Thank you for choosing us for your special day, happy we could make it a memorable one. Great to hear you received excellent service from Joe and Cammie, they are a fantastic team and I know they will be over joyed that they were able to make your anniversary a great evening. We look forward to seeing you again soon.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: Had an amazing time at Añejo, and Jay was a big part of that. Super friendly, welcoming, and really knew the menu inside and out. Whether it was recommending the perfect cocktail or helping us pick out the best tacos, Jay made the whole experience feel effortless and fun. Service was on point without being overbearing — just good vibes all around. Definitely ask for Jay if you're heading to Añejo! @ANEJO GIVE JAY A RAISE

reviews.text: SCAM! If you order happy hour food and do not finish it, they will attempt to make you pay without allowing you to take home your leftovers. At no point before asking for the bill (or while ordering) did the waiter mention this policy nor was it stated on the menu. This is illegal. Do yourself a favour and eat somewhere that respects you and your hard earned money.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Megan,

I'm very sorry to read this and there must be a miscommunication somewhere on our part. I would really like to hear in more detail what happened so that I can try and fix this. If you would be willing to email me at gm.4thst@anejo.ca, I would really appreciate the opportunity to make this up to you. I look forward to hearing from you.

Cheers! 
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: Showed up Sunday night for a some cocktails and snacks with two others around 8pm. Service was amazing, wish I could remember our servers name, but he was phenomenal! We had the salsa platter and queso fundito to start. The drinks were top notch. I had the surf and turf from the menu and it was cooked to perfection. reviews.text:
The food was great. We both love Mexican food, and honestly the great reviews influenced the choice to go here. Our server was great and took good care of us. The atmosphere was authentic. We could see many others clearly having a good time and the place was surprisingly busy for a Monday evening.

We shared the house salsa tasting platter, and a platter of 6 tacos. The food was excellent all around.  I especially enjoyed the tasting selection of salsa, dips, and chips (warm chips!).  Of course we also each had a margarita - him the mango, and me the blood orange.

I would definitely come back if I were in Calgary again. I highly recommend this restaurant. A++
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Nuala,

Wow, what a fantastic review, thank you so much for all your kind words. It is reviews like this that others will see and try us because of it and we can't thank you enough for that. Hopefully we will be on your list of stops next time you are in town. 

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin 
General Manager

reviews.text: Food was good, it's a nice small resteraunt but very loud and hard to have conversations, overall good though.
Need more of these spots around. Trendy, funky, Añejo!😀 Ricardo was attentive and seems to know the moment we needed anything

I just have to give a huge shoutout to Cami. Not only is she amazing at what she does, but she’s also the best at taking care of you in every way. Case in point: I ate a whole ramekin of jalapeños ( I lost a bet from my boyfriend), and she immediately made it her top priority to get me water lol.

Seriously though, Cami went above and beyond, was super chill, and made everything so easy. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience.

Thanks a ton, Cami! You're the best.
Had an amazing experience with food, ambiance and our server Anna! Very heart-warming and lovely person! Would come back for food and service!
Went to Anejo for a girls night and Anna was so amazing. Literally the best hype woman and made our experience so enjoyable. Would come back for the food (but especially for Anna)
Went for happy hour.  Margaritas were ok but very low volume drinks. Like 2 oz of fluid and rest ice.  Drinks ok, but used to Vegas quality margaritas.  Happy hour tacos were great.  Service was ok
Margs slap and the service is friendly! Like tequila? Go here. Nuff said. Don’t even read another review. Why would you? Also Anna was a ray of sunshine as a server. That is all.
Our server Cami recommended a tequila based on my (picky) preferences that was a great discovery. Perfect service even during busy happy hour. Thank you!

It was okay, not as exciting as the starters, but still a decent dish. Overall, a lovely spot with great vibes and some really memorable bites.

reviews.text:
We are huge fans of Anejo in Banff, AB. During Stampede week we stopped in at Anejo in Mission and found a cozy corner on the outside patio. This has got to be one of the best Happy Hours in the city! $4 tacos and $7 margs. The Cadillac is not too sweet and if you like the smoky finish try the Mezcalarita. Perfect! Our server, Cami is so personable and fun! She was only on her fourth shift and is like an old pro. Sorry Edmonton, your loss is Anejo’s gain! And lastly, I shazamed the whole play list, sheer perfection and that’s not the double margarita taking lol!
Steven and Laura Day
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Laura and Steven,

Thank you for taking the time to leave such a great review, happy to hear you were able to join us over Stampede. You are correct, Edmonton's loss is our gain when it comes to Cami and I know she will be very happy to hear that she was able to make your experience a memorable one. Hopefully we will see you again before next Stampede for some more double margaritas and happy hour.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin

reviews.text: This place is a-ma-zing! Absolutely love it. Chilled out and relaxed atmosphere. Everything you could possibly want from a Mexican restaurant. The staff are very friendly and helpful. The tortilla chips and guacamole are amazing, that’s even before we get to the tacos and mains! The food is fresh, well prepared and well presented with some great flavours and their own twist of originality. I also happen to love the gluten free and lactose free spicy mayo sauce - you’ve got to try it! I don’t often get impressed going to restaurants but this one I would rate as 11/10. We will be back for sure!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola John,

Wow, what an amazing review, thank you for taking the time to write in. Our team in the kitchen take great pride in the product that they put out, everything is made with care from scratch and I know they will be happy to hear about your kind words. Hopefully we will see you again soon.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text:
5-stars for Mathew at the bar and the delicious tacos!!

As a restaurant manager, I highly suggest re-training your hostess as she almost made us want to leave upon arrival, at 1:50, in a very empty restaurant. She was holding the chair at the bar down so I couldn’t sit down, at the empty bartop - so unwelcoming and made everyone feel awkward, you could even tell the bartender thought it was odd. She was oddly worried about evening reservations?? Again there was an empty bartop and 16 empty tables.

I highly suggest reading the book “Unreasonable Hospitality”. A hostess should be the host of the party, ensuring everyone is having a great time. Sharing this feedback as I would hate for you to loose out on future sales!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Maddison,

Wow, what a fantastic review of Matthew and the food, thank you for taking the time to leave it. However I am sorry to hear that experience didn't extend to your first impression at the door. Thank you for taking the time to notify me of this as this is not the level of service that we hold ourselves too, I will be following up with my team in regard to this. Thank you again for taking the time to leave a review and for you feedback, it is greatly appreciated.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin 
General Manager

reviews.text:
We visited Añejo on a Sunday afternoon during happy hour, and although it was quite busy both inside and out on the patio, we were lucky enough to get a table without a long wait, even without a reservation. The atmosphere was lively but welcoming, and our server, Abraham, was absolutely amazing! He was warm, professional, and attentive. He really took great care of us and made the whole experience even better :)

One of the highlights was definitely the fresh guacamole! If you order it, they bring all the ingredients to your table and make it right in front of you. You can even choose how smooth or chunky you want it, which adds such a fun and personalized touch. It’s not just about the flavor (which was incredible), but also about the experience of seeing it made fresh right there at the table.

We ordered some Mexican dishes, tacos, quesadillas, and a round of margaritas and tequila. Everything was full of flavor and came out hot and satisfying. It was the perfect way to enjoy a weekend afternoon, great food, great drinks, and a team that really makes you feel welcome.
Highly recommend!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Cami,

I'm not sure if this review was intended for our fourth street location in Calgary as we don't have anyone named Abraham there. I will hunt down the proper location and make sure Abraham receives this. It is always great to hear that our other locations are killing it, thank you so much for taking the time to leave a great review on how much you enjoyed your experience from service to food, margaritas and Tequila.

Cheers!
General Manager
Mike McLaughlin

reviews.text: Amazing service! Fantastic food as always. They made my birthday special and were accommodating even without a reservation!

Thank you for the great review of our food and service, very happy to hear you enjoyed yourself and thank you for choosing Anejo for your birthday, hopefully we will see you again before your next celebration.

After searching through different Mexican restaurants to find the perfect venue for our event, I am happy to share the Añejo Restaurant was the perfect place! They have an upstairs event space that can easy hold 30+ people and the atmosphere and vibe are perfect.

But it doesn't end there - the food and team at Anejo are amazing. The food was tasty and loved by all our guests and the creative drinks they were able to make made for a great presentation.

Finally the staff is so kind and accommodating. From Tennille for the event planning to Anna for the evening planning and serving, everything went perfectly and they were able to make changes on the fly. I cannot say enough good things about the team.

I look forward to hosting more events with the team at this venue and the others in Edmonton and Toronto.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Jerry,

Thank you soo much for the great review, I look forward to sharing this with Tennille and Anna. We are very happy to hear you and your guests enjoyed everything and we look forward to hosting you again soon.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

High-end Mexican, meets every type of tequila you could want.
I've been here a number of time.
The taco's are awesome. I could gain 50pounds eating the Pork and fish taco's
Atmosphere reminds me of walking into a nice Mexican place.
No booths, but lots of seating, great bar, Carlos, (Bartender) is awesome and knowledgeable. Ideally we are all looking for something unique, calm and enjoyable. ANEJO Delivers a ton of knowledge, types of Tequila and authentic food, without going south of the border. Perfect!
If I wanted to have a great date night, this is the place!

reviews.text:
Came here over the weekend(Sunday) with my wife and a friend. Place wasn’t busy so there was ample seating. The host let us know we could sit anywhere.

The waiter was friendly and had no problem letting us take our time to find out what we wanted to order. We started off with beers and the guacamole and chips. I was expecting it to come ready, but to my surprise it was made right in front of us so you definitely knew it was fresh and it tasted fantastic.
We then ordered tacos. Me and my wife wanted to split tacos but weren’t sure which to try and the server recommended his favourite the pork, and also said the fish were the most popular so we took his suggestion and got 3 of each and he was not wrong! They tasted fantastic. The table also has a verity of hot sauces to put on them as well. My favourites the hot almost white mayo type and the bottle with green sauce, neither were extremely spicy so it was good because I only like moderate spice.

Overall a really great place that has great atmosphere, good service(staff and speed). The only downside I would say would be the price. I get nowadays everything is expensive and it is in a prime location so you expect to pay more. We payed about $80 for the guac, two beers, and six tacos plus tip which I thought was about pricey for a lunch, but at the end of the day was not a deal breaker. Maybe not a place I would come super regularly to, but once or twice a year would be good.

I’d come back to try a few other things on the menu that interest as I did enjoy the food and everything it had to offer.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Alan,

Thank you for the great review, we love to hear the feedback. Happy to hear you enjoyed the tableside guacamole and tacos and that your server was able to make suggestions that met your expectations. We make the white hot mayo in house and it is my favorite too, not too spicey but a nice kick to it. We do have happy hour twice a day from 3pm to 5pm and 9pm to close. During these times our margaritas and beers are $7ea and our tacos are $4ea, hopefully we see you again soon for happy hour, thank you again for the feedback, it is greatly appreciated.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text:
We came around 19;00 on a Monday night. The hostess was very accommodating to our slight reservation change. It did start to get busy after 20:00. We started off with the mussels, if you love mussels this is a must try. The way it was cooked was different that anything I have tried before, just the right amount of spice and smokey flavour.
We opted for 3 carnitas and fish tacos. The carnitas was not too salty and very well seasoned. We have tried plenty of super dry carnitas before but this one was tender and not dry and chalky.
The fish tacos were super crispy but light and the addition of their house made horseradish mayo was the perfect pairing.
Highly recommend trying their margaritas and tequila flight as well.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Emma,

Thank you for the incredible review, we are very happy to hear that you enjoyed you experience with us. A lot of the smokiness from the mussels comes from the mezcal that is used in the dish, I suggest trying a nice sipping mezcal to pair it next time, it really enhances those flavors. Thank you again for taking the time to leave a great review, we look forward to seeing you again next time.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin 
General Manager

El ambiente es muy bueno, el lugar es muy agradable.
reviews.textTranslated: The food was good. But I think for those of us who aren't used to Mexican food, which is mostly spicy, and for non-Mexican customers, you should ask how spicy you prefer it. In my case, the molcajete was too spicy for me. I repeat, I'm not used to or tolerant of strong spices. The atmosphere is very good, the place is very pleasant.

reviews.text: Horrible experience just trying to get in.  Rudest hostess ever!   Many many tables but they didn't sit people ordered us around to stand in a line like we were school children. I am very sorry to hear that had a negative experience at the front door. Often times we have a lot of reservations, especially around our happy hour times, so while there may seem to be open tables, they are being held for incoming guests. That in no way is an excuse for not being hospitable, if you would like to discuss this further, I can be reached at gm.4thst@anejo.ca. Thank you for your feedback, I look forward to hearing from you.

Cheers!

reviews.text:
I recently visited Añejo Restaurant, and while the food and service from our server were fantastic, the experience started off a bit rocky. When we arrived, the restaurant was completely empty, but the hostess seemed to have an attitude and was reluctant to seat us right away. It was a bit off-putting, especially since there were no other diners.

However, once we were seated, the lunch turned around. Our server was amazing—attentive, friendly, and knowledgeable about the menu. We ordered the ribs and the burrito, and both dishes were exceptional. The ribs were tender and flavorful, and the burrito was perfectly seasoned and generously portioned.

Despite the rocky start, the food and the excellent service from the server more than made up for it. If they can work on the hospitality at the door, this place would be a five-star experience.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Pramod,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, I am happy to hear you enjoyed the food and service. Also, thank you for your feedback regarding your experience upon entry with the host, I look forward to using this as a training tool.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

I enjoyed the table side guacamole, various salsas and chips, and the tacos (braised beef, pork, and fish) were delicious, especially with the spicy mayo!

Get the salsa sampler to start. Spectacular array of flavors. From there.  ..any of the tacos we had were great. Enjoy the happy hour after 9pm too

We were there to celebrate a friend's birthday in a small group of 7 people, so we reserved two tables. The hostess refused to put two tables together, even though there were tables available. In other words, we had to sit at separate tables. But even though we were at separate tables, it seems that it was not a problem for this restaurant to charge the gratuity as if we were all together at the same table. The waitress apparently did not like being questioned about this. As for the food, some things were very good, others were quite bad. The mushroom tacos and the children's menu were quite bad. The other tacos and the guacamole were very tasty. Honestly, I don't know if I will repeat the experience.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Carlos,

I am very sorry to hear about you experience with us, this is not typical and not what we expect from ourselves. If you would be kind enough to reach out to me at gm.4thst@anejo.ca, I would like to get some more info from you and discuss this further. I hope to hear from you soon.

Cheers!

General Manager

reviews.text: The food was great drinks were okay and service was excellent.

Fantastic experience at Anejo! Kyla was amazing, very funny and attentive, she really
made our dinner special. She recommended the mango margaritas, which were delicious. Thanks Kyla and Anejo team!

We went here for a small group supper. We made reservations in advance, which proved to be a good move, as the restaurant was very busy.

The summer feature cocktail (see photo) was the Japanese Slip N' Slide. It was refreshing and was nicely presented.

This place is well known for the fresh guacamole made table-side. We ordered it and thoroughly enjoyed it.

This restaurant has an energetic and upbeat vibe, which also means that the music is loud. We asked to be seated in as quiet an area as possible, but it was still a bit challenging to hear the conversation at times.

The service was good, though at times we felt rushed to hurry up and finish our meal and pay the bill. We went for an early supper and we got the feeling that they were eager to turn the table for the next party. I think we spent about 80 minutes in the restaurant in total. If you are looking for a leisurely dinner out, you might opt for a different place. If you prefer a quick meal with OK food and drinks in high-energy atmosphere, this place might be for you.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Sarah,

Thank you for taking the time to leave such a detailed review. I am very happy to hear you enjoyed the drinks and guacamole. Apologies about the volume, during busy times when we are full the noise can get a little loud and quiet areas are hard to come by, other than the patio (which has been horrible for wasps even with pest control).Sorry that you felt rushed, we try and give every table ample time to enjoy themselves and on the rare occasion of a walk-in table coming in that we try and squeeze in before a reservation we like to let our guests enjoy their experience with us. Thank you again for taking the time to leave us your feedback, I look forward to discussing these areas of opportunity with my team.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: This is the fish taco that they brought out for a customer with an onion and garlic allergy. It would have been nice if they told us that they do not prepare any fresh vegetables (shredded cabbage, ect) that could be put on the taco instead of just bringing out empty taco's and telling us that no vegetables could be provided.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Marcus,

Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review, and sorry you were not happy with what you received. We do use a lot of garlic and onion in our menu items, but we will do our best to learn from this and have more options that cater to these types of allergies. Thank you again for leaving a review about your experience, I will pass your comments on to the management team and we will use this as a learning opportunity.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin

reviews.text:
Tacos were quite disappointing, little to no flavor,  and dry, the fish was ok crispy but again no flavor, the birria had no spice or seasoning
Was also thrown off at the start, walked in at 5pm was told they have a lot of reservations and would be asked to leave at 7 unless we sat at the bar... they eventually sat us  and said rhey moved a reservation around but just seemed weird, like you don't prepare for walk-ins? I have never been told that at a restaurant. Atmosphere was nice, guacamole was fresh but could also use some seasoning, Margaritas and cocktails were excellent. Perhaps their dishes are better than their tacos though.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Scott,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, I am sorry to hear you did not enjoy your experience. Please feel free to email me at gm.4thst@anejo.ca, I would love to get some more details from you and hopefully we can correct this.

Cheers!

Hola Pradeepa,

Thank you for leaving us a great review, see you again soon.

Cheers!

reviews.text:
I have been to the location in Edmonton and LOVED it but for some reason, the tacos weren't slapping the same in Calgary.
I made a reservation in advance as we came for a weekend trip and wanted our tacos and margaritas 🪇🌮. Unfortunately, although I requested the patio, I was told when I arrived that it was first come first serve. Would have appreciated knowing before hand but no big deal. We then got seated at probably, the least desired seat in the entire restaurant. This was an out of town date night... I do think it's important to read your guest notes and try and seat accordingly. If I wasn't able to get the patio I would have appreciated not having the middle table on the shared booth right in front of the bar. I had to ask to be moved which I hated doing.
Either way this is a great spot for happy hour tacos and margaritas. Maybe it was an off night for the tacos but I do think the Edmonton location is doing something right 👌

reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Nicholas,

Thank you for taking the time out of your day to leave us a review. If there is anything we could do to turn that 4 star in a 5, please feel free to email me at gm.4thst@anejo.ca, I would love to hear your feedback.

Cheers!

reviews.text:
Parking in the area sucks. However, if you can carpool or use a different means of transport, then it is great.

It is really loud and busy in the evening, went on a Saturday night at 7:30pm. Service was a bit slow due to the number of people there.

Started with the guacamole and corn chips, they were great for a group of four. The queso dip comes in a hot bowl, the server recommends to stir often, and I 100% agree. Shared this with 1 other person as we got 6 shells to eat it with.
Other people at our table got tacos and the salsa tasting, and no one complained.

Will for sure go back hopefully at a less busy time or maybe during happy hour as the food is cheaper at this time.

reviews.text:
Went for dinner tonight for my sister-in-laws birthday and must say that I had higher expectations for Anejo as I used to frequent this place quite a bit years ago.

For starters, in the past when seating with a fairly large group, they would bring chips and pico to the table and now it’s just a bowl of lacklustre seasoned taco chips.

Had ordered the beef tacos and wasn’t overly impressed, the meat was bulky and dry in the taco and lacked seasoning, had to use a bunch of sauce just to get it past my windpipe. Others at the table had some comments about the food as well, my stepdads chicken milanese was really dry.

Ordered some Churros for the table after the meals were done but the churros were way undercooked and were like wet pancake batter when you bit into them.

No Cutlery or napkins when the food arrived and had to waive down the server for some attention at the table numerous times. 20% auto gratuity is also a little over the top for the level of service you receive here.

Overall I don’t think I would go back anytime soon, I’ll eventually be there again I’m sure, but it definitely won’t be my first choice.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Paul, 

I am very sorry to hear you didn't enjoy your experience with us. I would very much appreciate the opportunity to discuss this further with you. If you are interested, I can be reached at gm.4thst@anejo.ca. I look forward to talking with you and getting an insight on your experience and hopefully we can improve on the way we do things. Also, if you are willing I would like to try and change your mind, if you would be up for giving us another try.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: Its not possible to rate less than 5 stars for Anejo. They really do offer a flawless experience, quality food that is not overpriced, great service, and lovely atmosphere (especially in Summer with the classic sidewalk patio). Great selection of unique mocktails for people who choose not to drink, which I love. Haven't tried the alcoholic drinks, but my friends enjoyed them.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much, William, for taking the time to leave us such a great review :). We love creating wonderful experiences for everyone and are happy we were able to offer that! We hope to see you back soon for more mocktails :)

reviewContext.Dietary restrictions: Good Mocktails for non drinkers, and menu was gluten friendly with easy modifications for my friend.

reviews.text:
**Frustrating and Potentially Unfair Treatment at Restaurant**

Our dining experience started off poorly with very confusing and seemingly unfair service at the entrance. We were initially told to wait an hour, but after my girlfriend spoke to the staff, the wait time suddenly dropped to 20 minutes. Post a quick bathroom break, the same staff member contradicted herself and reverted to the original one-hour wait. Miraculously, we were seated immediately once my girlfriend returned. This inconsistent handling and the staff's dismissive attitude towards me, while immediately accommodating my girlfriend, felt not only disorganized but also sexist.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Farshid,

I am very sorry to hear that you felt as though you were being mistreated at the door. During our busy times we try very hard to accommodate as many walk-ins as quickly as possible and when we have a lot of reservations, wait times can tend to get a bit long. Quite often when we think someone is going to leave we will drop the wait time, but sometimes unknown things pop up, like one person at a table is leaving and gets their bill but the rest decide to stay. Perhaps this was a breakdown of communication on our part, and for that I apologize. However I do not believe that anyone on my team is sexist in anyway, we are a very mixed bag of people who love what we do and work very well with people of all kinds. I would like to get some more details about your experience, if you would be willing to email me at gm.4thst@anejo.ca, and maybe we can learn from this experience and use it as a training piece for our restaurant. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

All the best,
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: Honestly, this place is overrated. I have been probably 5x now and each time, I’ve spent a ton of money and haven’t enjoyed my experience. The tacos are not authentic by any means and have minimal toppings without any, repeat ANY flavour. They just rely on cilantro and if you order without, the tacos are just not good. The guac, however, is good and they do it table side. I do also enjoy the margaritas and the drinks I’ve had. Even though the atmosphere is cool and in mission, if you want good Mexican, go somewhere else where you can enjoy a more authentic experience that doesn’t rely on upselling their customers.

Had a pretty okay night at dinner here. First time we ever tried this place. One server was really nice and the other was rushing us out... Even though our bill was like $200 and we weren't even there for 1 and a half hours... That just left a bad taste in my mouth.

As for the food, chips were very plain and guac was alright. Freshly prepared, but lacked flavour. Tacos were alright but again too simple for the price and a bit disappointing. The coconut shrimp was not bad. That was probably the best part of the meal and it wasn't mind blowing, just okay.
The place was nice enough but that one server that kept asking if we were leaving and interrupting was irritating. Like I said, we spent hundreds of dollars and were only there for like an hour and 10 minutes. Drinking the entire time, so we weren't just sitting at the table. Very weird to be rushed like that on a Wednesday night...

reviews.text:
I absolutely love coming here. Now, I have a food allergy, and admittedly a ridiculous allergy to be going to a Mexican restaurant… (I’m allergic to peppers, yes the vegetable, yes all of them) and the staff here are INCREDIBLE - each one of them.

From servers to all in the kitchen, they are so keen to work with me to find what I can and can’t have (for anyone else suffering like me, my go-to is the house guac no special salt or jalapeños, and pork tacos no cabbage or jalapeños).

The food is incredible, the drinks are amazing, and the atmosphere is perfect. I will happily come back any and every chance I get, one of my favourite restaurants in the city. Even the dishes I can’t have make me want to risk it just to try them.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Cyndi,

We are so happy to hear that you enjoyed yourself with us and love coming here. As far as your allergy goes, not ridiculous at all, you should be able to dine out and I am very happy to hear we were able to accommodate. Hopefully we will see you again soon.

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin

My husband had the molcajete and it was satisfactory.  The meal was over $100 and the value was just not there.  We used to come several years ago and it was fantastic.  It’s really gone down hill and we won’t be returning.

reviews.text: Brittany brought the vibes and the margs <3

I'm editing this review a few years after the initial one to reflect changes in ownership that have led to a decline in overall quality.

At the time of my initial review, I was employed at Añejo and to be honest, loved the food and drinks available. With a change in head chef, the menu took a turn that I didn't agree with and I moved to another restaurant. Then the owners sold the company and brand, leading to a severe decline in quality and care in the food and staffing departments. It became more important to be cost efficient on both food and labor and was no longer the local spot that I would recommend to everyone that came to town.

We went dinner, and the service was very quick and the tacos were delicious.

It does get a bit pricy, 3 tacos are about $33 and one drink on average is about $15
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hola Khushboo,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a great review. Our premium tacos do range from about $23 to $29 dollars but that is a reflection of the quality product we use. Our classic tacos are 3 for $17 and the cocktails range from $12 to $31 depending on what you would like to enjoy. If our regular pricing is not to your liking, let me tell you about our happy hour. 7 days a week we have happy hours from 3pm to 5pm and 9pm to close where we serve classic tacos for $3 each, the majority of our margaritas and beer are $6 each and all of our agave spirits and tequila is 50% off and that includes our ultra premium brands. Would love to see you at happy hour sometime to enjoy great food, drinks and vibes....patio season is right around the corner!

Cheers!
Mike McLaughlin
General Manager

reviews.text: S/O to evelyn, great service by her & made our night welcoming and fantastic recommendations for foods/ drinks !

reviews.text: Añejo Restaurant offers a captivating atmosphere adorned with authentic Mexican ornaments and a thoughtfully designed interior. The tasteful blend of flavors in their food, accompanied by an extensive variety of tequilas, makes for a delightful dining experience. The attentive service complements the overall good eating experience, contributing to the restaurant's appealing concept. It's a must-visit for those seeking an authentic and enjoyable Mexican dining experience.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much, Jose, for leaving us a message and 5-star review! We are so pleased to hear about your experience and what made it so unique! We hope to keep delivering great experiences and to see you back soon!

reviews.text: I am giving this review a three star rating only because we walked in on a Sunday afternoon and the restaurant was less than half full, and we did not have a reservation. The hostess proceeded to tell us it was nowhere for us to sit as everything was reserved. And that just seemed not helpful. We ended up convincing them to let us sit at a table for an hour and we had some tacos and margaritas. Food and drink are pretty reliable here, and their happy hour is a good one.
We had a great time here, the food and service were excellent. We had the tableside guac, a trio of tacos and the Chile Relleno. Everything was awesome and we really enjoyed the whole experience.

reviews.text:
Really unsure of this restaurant.

On the one hand, the interior decor is nice and seems welcoming. On the other hand, the chairs are not that comfortable and the upholstery is peeling everywhere - is that meant to add to the charm?

The server that we got seemed nice, but was also innatentive and didn't check in often, even though it wasn't busy.

The food was good, but the prices seem over the top. $33 for six tacos is a bit much. If you go during the happy hours, then prices are much better for both food and drink.

So... pros and cons in all aspects.

Ordered the Salsa Tasting and Tableside Guacamole. The food came quickly and the Guacamole was mixed with fresh ingredients. The food was great. I will be coming back to try more food. A fun spot to take a date

reviews.text: Anejo is always a good time, if you can make it in for their happy hour that’s a win. A reservation is a good idea - the hostess turns her nose up at you if you don’t have a reservation and try to come for happy hour, or any time at all really on a weekend or busy time. The servers/bartenders are good, the food and drinks are phenomenal, but the hostess as the first line of contact, really sets a bad vibe.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Jess, thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We appreciate your feedback and have coached our host team in this regard. We are really sorry if they gave you that impression. We welcome all, with reservation and without - as long as we have open tables to offer. We hope you give us a second chance!

reviews.text: Very disappointed with the pulled pork taco recipe change. The tacos are so dry and salty. We have always kept this as a treasured destination for all our family members going here for celebrations.  After this experience, then checking with others - I don’t believe there is anyone that would accept this as a positive change in the pork Tacos. Us and our extended family will not be back until the recipe changes.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Jade, thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We changed the taco pork recipe a few months ago to pork carnitas. We are sorry to hear the new recipe was not to your liking. The new recipe has had excellent feedback from other guests! We hope you can find something else on our menu to bring you back. Gracias!

reviews.text: One of our favourites when we visit Calgary. Our waitress was amazing, pleasant and helpful. Food was delicious as usual and the atmosphere was great.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you Ben for taking the time to leave us a review. We appreciate it and love that you enjoyed your last experience at Anejo! We hope to see you back soon. Thank  you again for this great review :)

reviews.text: The service was great, the server was super happy and easy to talk to without being uppity to the point it was annoying, the food was delish, I had pork tacos and my lady had whitefish tacos, and I really dont have much to complain about. The noise level was a bit excessive for my taste as I don't drink anymore and it seems to be more of a talk loud and drink atmosphere when I was there and people kept trying to talk over one another but that's not the bars fault, but it did kill my mood a little bit when I'm a loud person and kept on having to raise my voice just to talk to the person I was eating with. Past that it was a pleasure eating there. Also I had the ribs for a Appy and they were like fall of the bone and delish!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Larry! thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We appreciate your compliments on the food and feedback about the noise level. We hope to see you back again soon!

reviews.text: Order the Queso Fundido, the experience of how it’s plated and presented is awesome, great prices compared to other Mexican style restaurants that I have visited, tacos are nice and simple, not over-complicated and they offer a selection of salsas and sour cream to add on the side, fun and unique marg selection, 10/10 recommend for a date night

My husband had a shot of don julio he enjoyed it and I had the sangria which was also really good. One of the nicest bar displays i have ever seen! good service and nice atmosphere. Was quiet on a wednesday afternoon ! paid parking near by!

The service was also great and fast! Añejo’s is definitely worth a visit (or more).

reviews.text: Took advantage of their weekday late happy hour that is 9pm till close, with $3 tacos and $6 margaritas! These tacos reminded me of a centralized mexico city cuisine, and let me tell you, they did not disappoint, great tacos and amazing knowledge of the staff when it comes to the tequila process and its great bar selection, will definitely come back again!

reviews.text: Still one of the best Mexican spots in the city. Amazing drink selection, great snacks, delicious tacos. The mocajete bowl is top shelf.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Pete, for your review! We are happy to have made it to the top of your list! We hope to see you back soon :)

reviews.text: I was excited to try this place, headed down after calling to book a reservation a few hours in advance. When we arrived we asked for a patio (also told first come first serve) and there had been one available. When we got seated a different waitress tapped my sister on the shoulder and rudely said “get up you’re not supposed to be here” we said we had just been sat down, and the rude waitress forced us out of the table to seat another group. There had been a miscommunication. We then asked if we could move to a patio when another table had been cleaned up (there was a clearly empty table and full of used cups, just hadn’t been cleaned yet) the waitress said no, and it would take well over an hour (very blatant lie) After that horribly rude encounter we then were sat inside next to the washrooms… you could literally hear people flushing and washing their hands. We all decided not to spend money here due to this experience and walked out. The waitress was so shocked, yet I don’t understand why. Ended up walking to native tongues where we had a delicious meal and the waitresses took amazing care of us. Go to Native tongues instead I guarantee the staff and experience will be nicer.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We are sorry for your poor experience with us. Would you be able to share more details with me about the service staff? We would like to offer proper coaching to them. We are always aiming to provide excellent service and create positive experiences for those visiting us, and I would like to apologize on behalf of the team. 
If you have time to discuss further, please email at anna@anejo.ca. I look forward to hearing from you. 
Anna Portillo, GM

reviews.text: My friend and I decided to come here for a round of margaritas tonight. The drinks were great, but the service and attention of the staff and other customers was even better (which is why I felt like I should write a review). We had a man approach us on the patio and although my friend and I handled the situation, it was an amazing feeling to know that both the staff and other tables were aware of the situation and observing the encounter incase we needed interference.  Thank you so much to our server, Connor, for checking in on us to make sure everything was okay, the awesome family behind us for praising us on how it was handled, and to the management team who treated us with another round of tequila to apologize for any inconvenience! Your attention to both customer experience and safety is greatly appreciated and we'll definitely be back for another round! :)
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Cheyenne, thank you for taking the time to leave us such a lovely review. We are happy to hear your experience was made so much better by Connor and the team. We will let him know about your review. This means a lot to us! We hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: used to come here all the time but since they got rid of the pulled pork tacos i won’t be back
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Abi, 
Thank you for leaving us a review. We changed our pork taco to a more traditional recipe. We are sorry that it isn't the old style but we promise that the new Pork Carnitas taco meat it is equally delicious, if not more than the old one! The new style is salt cured and slow roasted pork shoulder. We hope you find something else you enjoy on our menu. Change is, sometimes, unavoidable :)

reviews.text: Great food and drinks. Extremely horrible experience with the service. I have been here a few times before which made me want to bring my friends to celebrate my birthday here. We came on a Wednesday night during happy hour. I had called ahead to make a reservation as my party was 7 people and wanted to make sure they could accommodate us. The restaurant as a whole was not crazy busy and we had ordered drinks until the rest of the party showed up. Our server was extremely inpatient with us. From the get go she advised us that the bar tender was busy and we told her it’s not a problem. Throughout the night she was very short with us and rushing us to place an order. One of my guests had gone up to the bar with a side plate to grab limes as we asked our server multiple times, waited and received nothing. We let it slide because we wanted to enjoy the night. We asked for tequila shots for everyone to celebrate the birthday and our server was abrupt and rude when asking what kind of tequila we wanted. One of my guests is a district manager for 5 other pubs in Calgary and was fed up with the service we received; so she got the attention of the manager and complained about our service, only to have another customer interrupted our dinner to make rude comments about us. That only shows how unprofessional and disrespectful our server was to go talk to another table about my party. I am extremely disappointed with my experience here as we just wanted to have some good tacos and drinks. Had the server come to our table and apologize by letting us know she was busy it would have been completely understandable. But to have another guest at the restaurant come up to my table on my birthday and be rude and disrespectful is unacceptable and completely inappropriate. Food and drinks were great but the service received ruined the entire experience.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Alaa, 
First of all, thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. I am saddened to hear about your experience with us. I want to apologize on behalf of the whole team for your poor experience. We aim to provide excellent service and create fun experiences for everyone who we welcome into our restaurant. I would like to have more details and open a conversation with you if you are ok with that. We appreciate any feedback we receive and try to be in an always improving mindset. Please reach out to anna@anejo.ca when you have a chance. I look forward to hearing from you. 
Anna, GM.

reviews.text: Great staff, great food. Cool atmosphere in the restaurant.

The service is super slow... We had to wait 40min to get our tacos, 40 more minutes to get an extra taco and another 40 min to get dessert... Supper annoying, Especially with tacos...  not sure If I will be back, I really like the food but we have tried the Añejo in Banff and the service is way better and faster... So dissapointed! But if you are patient and like to wait forever for your food, this is your place...

Absolutely loved the atmosphere. Feels very authentic and the vibe overall made my experience feel great for the majority. 1 month ago, I had a birthday here for a party of 12 which I reserved a month in advance. The food was fantastic (guacamole is a must just wish more chips tho since we had to keep ordering) and I especially enjoyed their happy hour deals for margaritas, all tequila, and $3 tacos. My only issue and it may have been that night, was the service. Constantly I had to wave the waiter down after waiting for a quite a while. It was odd having a large group and having no attention from the servers. I guess I assumed because the party was larger that there would be a fair amount of attention but it ended up being constant waving down. I would still return back because I’ve heard reviews that generally it is not like this but to be honest, it did make my experience much less enjoyable and stressful as it was hard to order a drink or food.  Overall it was great, but really wished service can be improved for larger gatherings that were booked in advance.

reviews.text:
After living in Mexico for many years and eating at Mexican style restaurants in many different countries, I found one worth writing about.
Good drinks with ample variety of tequilas, great food, environment, the place is nicely decorated and the service is outstanding.
To the restaurant: Great job, keep it up and thanks!
To the reader: This is the place for Mexican food and service in Calgary!
Cheers, Roberto E. Davidson

reviews.text: So the first time we went, it was good enough to come back. Second time was an abysmal experience. Nearly non-existent service, took over an hour to get tacos (maybe they had to track down an animal to butcher, I don’t know) was offered a whopping 15% off at the end. Had 2 drinks over the course of 90 minutes, that’s how often we were checked on while we sat there waiting for our tacos. It was just so confusing how the restaurant managed to screw up this bad. No shortage of excuses from the staff, though. Oh almost forgot, the menu items that say gluten intolerant friendly are, in fact, not.

We also got some salsa and guacamole with the starter tortilla chips. I'd recommend getting the full-size guacamole though as you can use it with the main order as well. .  We ordered the beef rib tacos and molcajete de Carne and both were packed with flavor. This place will be my go to for my Mexican fix! Oh... we also had four margaritas, the chili coconut, the mango, the mulled savory wine one,  and the ginger margaritas all very yummy!  This is a must-visit place!

reviews.text:
I came for an evening hang out with friends. This is a popular Mexican restaurant with tasty margaritas - had their seasonal (blood orange and walnut) as well as their guava, both of which were easy to sip and taste true to the name. Their guacomole was refreshing (used fresh ingredients but did not necessarily taste unique to other places) and great for sharing.

For tacos, I had the taco flight (beef barbacoa, chorizo, pulled pork, chicken tinga, mushroom, grilled tilapia) and tried their grilled mahi mahi taco. The portion sizes were pretty good for about $5 per taco. The main critique is that their mushroom taco is heavily sauced that you can't really appreciate the mushrooms themselves and the mahi mahi was overcooked and a bit on the dry side. The flavors otherwise were good and the meats were tender and seasoned well.

A place I would plan to go back to, especially to try their margaritas!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We appreciate your feedback which we have taken into consideration. We hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: I took my daughter there for her birthday and we don't regret it. Our server was attentive and prompt. We had the mussels for an appy, La Carne, Birria tacos for mains and Dulce de leche Tres Leches for desert. Yes! We ate it all because the food was delicious and fresh and I can't critique it, too good and no complaints..  They took special care to remember her birthday!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review! We are happy that you enjoyed this special occasion with us. We hope to see you back soon! :)

reviews.text:
I came here with friends for dinner - we were having a great time and the Guacamole and tacos were really good.

Unfortunately that’s the only reason this place gets only 2 stars - the rest of the experience was disgusting! We were treated disrespectfully right from the start.  Our waitress - Angela (a blonde waitress with heavy makeup) - was rude and unwelcoming.  We understand that service work is hard but she placed the food on our table rudely - almost throwing the plates.

We did watch her serve other tables - our table was of mixed races - but she was definitely treating caucasians better! We don’t take lightly to even a subtle air of racism.

We were trying to be nice to hopefully place her in a better mood but after we paid and after her terrible service she had the audacity to come to our table and tell us that we didn’t tip, when our friend that payed said he did - she argued with us that we didn’t - honestly she didn’t even deserve a tip.

Honestly - we think we deserved an apology from her which was never received even after talking to management.

This was upsetting and put a downer on our outing for no reason!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Hanan, 
Thank you for taking the time to write us a review. We take these accusations very seriously. I would like to invite you to email me directly at anna@anejo.ca for further information. I look forward to hearing back from you. 
Anna Portillo, GM

reviews.text:
Went on a weekend evening and the place was quite busy. The place takes reservations, but the host was able to find a table for us. In the warmer months there is indoor and outdoor seating. We were seated inside and the place is quite loud, likely due to a combination of poor acoustics, loud music, and a large volume of people in one space. Would not necessarily recommend as a place to have long conversations.

Ordered the guacamole, mushroom flautas, and three tacos (beef barbacoa, chicken tinga, and braised mushrooms on a flour tortilla). The guacamole took some time to be brought to the table and the avocados are mashed in front of you. The guacamole is refreshing and the chips that come with it are fresh and crunchy. The mushroom flautas were filled with cheese and mushrooms, which made for a very filling and savoury appetizer. Each of the tacos were well-presented. The chicken tinga was quite tangy in comparison to the other two.

The server who helped us was very attentive despite the busy evening as well. She did warn us that the flautas would be spicy (but they were not). The price was quite reasonable for the amount of food ordered.

Would recommend for a visit to have some good food, but would either relocate for conversation or ask for a table outside to cut down on the background noise.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review! It is much appreciated. We will keep the music levels in mind. Thank you!

reviews.text: Drinks and food are always good, but nothing special. The halfyhour prices are decent. I used to really like coming here but the last few times the service has been very slow and the hostess was not at all friendly or welcoming. It took over an hour for an order of 12 tacos, and the restaurant was maybe half full. Disappointing.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Lindsay,
We are sorry to hear your experience was not the best! This is not the kind of service we like to offer and, I would like to ask for more details about the hostess and the server to see where we can improve. I would like to kindly ask you to send me an email at anna@anejo.ca. We hope to make it better, and hopefully, have you join us another time for another chance!
Look forward to hearing from you.
Anna, GM

reviews.text:
Worst place to get tacos and food in Calgary.
Was in Calgary last week , and this restaurant spoiled my night.

This place is very dirty and unhygienic, had a bad rotten stench . Can't believe this place is still running considering health standards in Calgary .Perhaps the worst restaurant I been in Calgary. I was shocked to see a rat running across the bar towards the kitchen.

They served me burnt tacos which was small and refused to replace it. The guacamole had a rotten smell as it was days old. Talked to the chef who was very rude and he said he won't replace it as I already paid for them.

Extremely overpriced, lots of clean places in Calgary without rats running around . Bad quality expensive food ...

Can't believe this place is still open. Wish I could give this place less than one stars
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Hafiz, thank you for taking the time to write a review. I would like to discuss this in more detail directly if you are open to it. We have many systems in place to ensure pests are under control, such as biweekly pest control inspections, health inspections, and Steritech auditors on a regular basis, so your comment is highly unlikely.
Also, our guacamole is made to order so it is fresh every time you order one. Looking forward to hearing from you to discuss this further.
Anna Portillo, anna@anejo.ca
