reviews.text: Really awkward service, and unremarkable food. Dinner and dessert were served at the same time so the table was really cluttered. Waitresses came in rapid fire asking to clear plates that we were still using. It was weird to say no to three different servers in 5 minutes. But when I needed a drink no one came by. I even made eye contact with a server, smiled, and waved but she didn’t seem to get it. Plates weren’t cleared at all by the end of the night and staff gave us dirty looks until we left.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Casey,
thank you for taking the time to write us this review. We apologize for this experience since it is not how we want our guests to fell like while dining with us. I would like to invite you back if you decide to give us another chance. Please email at gm.4thst@anejo.ca if you accept our invitation.
Thanks,
Anna Portillo, GM

reviews.text:
The white sauce and beef tacos are what makes this place stand out.

If it's your first time try the margaritas and table side guacamole
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your wonderful review! :) Much appreciated.

reviews.text: Dog friendly. Food and drinks are amazing at this place. A little pricey, but justified since everything tastes so good. Halfy hour still as good as always!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Elle,
Thank you so much for taking the time to write us a review! We appreciate it! Hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: I've tried few Mexican restaurant in town and this by far one of the best! We keep coming back especially during patio season. Tacos and Guac are my favorite and nothing beats the presentation. I always do take advantage of their happy hour.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review! :) We are happy you enjoyed your time with us!

reviews.text: One of my favourite places to eat and drink in the Mission area. Beautiful thirst-quenching margaritas and delicious tacos. The freshly table-side made guacamole is not only entertaining but delicious! Also, they have the best happy hours!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review! :) We hope to see you back soon for delicious margaritas and tacos!

reviews.text: Great food and service. Guac and Taco's are amazing.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Devon!

reviews.text: Love the margaritas and taco spread. White sauce is da bomb!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review! :)

reviews.text: Really enjoy their happy hour. Will be back :)
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review! We are happy you enjoyed it. See you next time :)

reviews.text: Yummy😋😋😋

First off a huge shout out to our waiter she was super kind really relatable and understood what they offer on both drinks and food menus.....she offerred to talk us through the menus and this made our time so much easier and speaking to someone just really makes for the whole experience.....it was my first Mexican experience and having someone passionate about mexico and mexican food waiting on us was super helpful......she was sooo good we chose the type of food but we let her choose the specific flavours........the place is not too big nor too small.....its just right and for seating guests have the option to choose either high table or low relaxed dining......they have a large selection of margarittas and their baked chips that come with guacamole have falvours that can only be tasted not explained....the guacamole is served in these authentic mexican artifacts that can only be compared to african cooking and drinking pots......these absoarb and intensify the flavors ........the tacos are really tasty and have various options and textures and seems like the kind of place where the menu is always changing .....not static but in a good way......overall....I felt right at home and will def bring new recruits with me next time
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Dorah,
Thank you so much for your review! We appreciate the details and kind words. We would love to have you back soon!!

reviews.text: The tacos were good. We were sat next to a 20 top birthday party when we came for our anniversary so it was a little loud. We were also asked immediately by the server if we wanted chips and guacamole/ salsa where we said sure under the impression it’s complimentary like most Mexican restaurants; later on to find out it was $27 which I found to be a little misleading. Service was average.

Amazing food, fresh ingredients, beautiful presentation, the place is cozy plus gives you a latin vibe that you can only find if you go to Mexico....
The service is slow, we had a full house though, food took good 45 minutes to be made, but worth the wait.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hola Jorge, Thank you for taking the time to write us a review. We do apologize for the long time it took for the food to get to your table. We would love to have you back and offer you prompter service.

reviews.text: Delicious! Table-prepared guacamole was super impressive!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review! We are very happy you enjoyed our guac!

reviews.text: Go for the happy hour and you wont be disappointed. You're welcome
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Agree! :) Salud!

reviews.text: Great Friday vibe at the restaurant. Even though the place was full, we did a walk in and we were able to get a spot. Margaritas, Guac and Tacos are my favourite from this place.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review, Kanika! We love that you enjoyed your time with us and hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: Sooooo very nice. Love it
All the staff are so friendly but Erin is the best server I’ve ever had! Great food and margaritas :)
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review, Emily! Erin is so happy to hear you enjoyed your time with us. Erin and the Anejo team would love to have you back for another amazing experience! :)

reviews.text: Probably the worst birria tacos I've ever had for 23 dollars. So dry the consomme had no taste at all. The guac is nice they make at the table but totally lackluster I had to season it properly myself. I was starving or I would have sent it back.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Farron,
Thank you for your review. I am sorry you had a negative experience. The Birria Tacos are one of the most popular tacos we offer, so I am very sorry you didn't enjoy them as much as we do. I would like to invite you back, hoping to try to change your mind about our food. Please let me know if you accept my invitation by sending an email to anna@anejo.ca
Thank you,
Anna Portillo
GM

reviews.text: Awesome ambient and mexican food, we had a dish with grilled cactus, tacos, lots of tequila and margarita choices. Go for happy hour, and you will not leave hungry.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review, Stefan! We really appreciate you taking the time to leave us a message! We hope to see you back soon for more margaritas and delicious food!

reviews.text: El Carne was very good, but the drinks are small for the price and it is fairly tightly packed for seating.

Have been to Anejo many times, as they have some of the best margaritas & tacos! Matt, the bar manager, is an absolute delight and made great tequila & mezcal recommendations. Highly recommend - especially the classic marg & fish taco.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review, Anita! Matt is awesome and we are definitely lucky to have him! We are happy you enjoyed his recommendations and hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: Decent selection of tequila and the tacos were not bad. The happy hour everyday is good (3-6 and 9-closing).
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your review, Jose!
Our happy hour goes from 3-5pm and 9pm-close! We also hold the largest Tequila collection in Canada! Happy you noticed our collection ;)

reviews.text: Delicious fresh guacamole, mixed at the table. So many tequila choices. The flights were lovely to see the difference that aging makes. Great service, great vibe. The strawberry rhubarb  margaritas were amazing!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for taking the time to write us a review, Ashley! So happy you got to try a tequila flight and enjoyed the differences between the styles! We hope to see you back soon! :)

reviews.text: Mmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm Delicious 😋
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Gracias!!!

reviews.text: Tyler was the best server ever, made the experience. WELL DONE TYLER
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: He is definitely one of the best assets here! Thank you so much for taking the time to write us a review and recognize one of our team members!

reviews.text: Ricardo was a great server, awesome food awesome atmosphere definitely coming back!!!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Rebecca, for taking the time to write us such an awesome review! Ricardo will be very happy to see this! We hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: Always amazing !
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review, Grant!!!

reviews.text: Love this place, the decorations , friendly atmosphere and the best tacos in the city.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hola Noura! Thank you for your kind review. We hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: Unas margaritas buenazas y excelente atención
reviews.textTranslated: Some great margaritas and excellent service
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Gracias Amparo por tu review! Nos hace feliz que hayas disfrutado nuestras margaritas y servicio :) Esperamos verte pronto de regreso!

reviews.text: I love Anejo ! I’ve been a couple times now and it’s great every time, the pork tacos are amazing and fully loaded up! The guacamole bowl is so fresh, I love that they mix it right in front of you! Super outgoing staff, very bubbly and enjoy making conversation! Mango margs and pork tacos are my top picks!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Caitlin! Thank you so much for taking the time to write us a review! We are so happy you enjoy our food and service! We hope to see you back soon for more pork tacos and mango margaritas!
Anna

reviews.text: The half-priced hour is awesome, and the vibe inside is great. The place is always buzzing, and the tequila flows freely. The food is pretty good, and the margaritas are also nice. The servers can be a bit pretentious at times, especially if you ask for limes -- not everyone loves tequila. Overall, good ambiance, and decent food.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Michael,
Thank you for taking the time to write us a review! We really enjoyed your review, and would like to apologize for making you feel that way. I can assure you that is the last thing we want! We love our tequila and want to share the love and passion with everyone!
We hope to see you again!

reviews.text: As with many other places pre covid and current covid quality is just not the same, hope we all get back to that magic place again in our lives :- )
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Maggie,
Thank you for taking the time to write us a review. If you have the time, I would like to get more details about the quality. Please email me at anna@anejo.ca
Thanks!
Anna

reviews.text: Great food, great service!
best atmosphere
Very cool place with great margaritas and cool atmosphere
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: thank you for your review, Murray!

reviews.text: Great place..wonderful server who knew the menu and could give great recommendations...great flavours and of course some truly fabulous tequilla
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your kind review, Ellen!

reviews.text: After a long 12hour day at work I ordered food to take home and eat my first meal of the day and opened my food to this… a burnt steak. I was so disappointed. first time ordering from here and none of the food looked appetizing. the price i paid for (just two meals) cost me around $70 and the food did not anywhere nearly match the expected quality for that price point. tried calling back 4 times and got no answer- gave up and decided to write a review instead. don’t order from here!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Good Morning Tamanna, thank you for taking the time to write us about your poor service experience, I was hoping you could email me directly so that I can get some more details from you and hopefully rectify your poor experience.
If you would be so kind, please email me at anna@anejo.ca
Thanks,
Anna Portillo, GM

reviews.text: Great deals during happy hour. My favourite tacos are their fried tilapia ones!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review, Daniel! :)

reviews.text: Manager is terribly ignorant. Will be spending my money elsewhere.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Zyrell,
Thank you for taking the time to write us a review. I am sorry you feel this way. I would like to investigate more into this and would really appreciate it if you could email me at anna@anejo.ca with more information. I look forward to hearing from you.
Thank you!
Anna Portilo

reviews.text: I was disappointed . We were recommended this restaurant by a coworker but when we arrived we were told our table was only available for 1.5hrs because it was busy and we didn't even get our first drink delivered until about 30min into our visit. When it came time to order I asked if the enchaladas could be made with wheat tortillas but was told they are made in the morning and can't be substituted. I asked for a few minutes to find an alternative but there weren't really any options that didn't include cilantro (tastes like soap to me) and the waiter didn't return very quickly so we asked to pay the bill for the drinks and left to go somewhere else as there wouldn't be enough time to enjoy a meal at that point with the upcoming reservation on our table.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Good Morning David, thank you for taking the time to write us about your poor service experience, I was hoping you could email me directly so that I can get some more details from you and hopefully rectify your poor experience

If you would be so kind, please email me at brent@blancocantina.ca

Director of Operations
Anejo Restaurant Group

reviews.text: Excelente servicio, el mesero que nos atendió nos habló en español para que yo lo entendiera (buen detalle), el ambiente muy agradable.
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent service, the waiter who served us spoke to us in Spanish so I could understand him (nice touch), the atmosphere was very pleasant.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Muchisimas gracias por tu review, Adriana! Nos encanta escuchar que tviste una buena experiencia en nuestro restaurante. Esperamos verte de regreso pronto!!
Anna

reviews.text:
Great place! The food, the service and the drinks were excellent!. I 100% recommend this place.

The only down side is so hard to find parking around this area on Friday or Saturday nights.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your review, Daniela! We absolutely love what we do and we are so happy it is being transmitted to our guests! We hope to see you back soon and happy holidays!
Anna

reviews.text: Best margaritas in town!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: oh yeah, they are! :) thanks Jaspal!

reviews.text: Great atmosphere! The happy hour after 9 is awesome. Love the margarita flavours and the tacos.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your review, Brooke! We also have a 3-5 happy hour for those who need a break from responsibilities!
Anna

reviews.text: Excellent food, excellent service
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Mike! We appreciate your review!

reviews.text: Wonderful food, drinks, and service!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review, Megan!

reviews.text: The details are what separates this place from the rest. Welll done👌👌
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review! We really appreciate it :)

reviews.text: La comida es bastante buena me gustó mucho !!!!
reviews.textTranslated: The food is quite good I liked it a lot!!!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Gracias por tu review, Adriana!

reviews.text: Delicious food and excellent service!!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review! :)

reviews.text: Food was good, service was great, but it was way too noisy in there! Music could be turned down a notch. Practically lost my voice trying to talk to people across from me!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hi Joey, thank you for your review! We will keep the music volume level in mind. We are happy you enjoyed our food and service!

reviews.text: Been here a couple times over the past couple months and it was incredible. Definitely recommend to anyone looking for great food and atmosphere. Still maintained a nice intimate feel too. Really enjoyed ourselves.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Ian! We are so happy you enjoyed your time with us. Thank you for your review!

reviews.text: Lo recomiendo. El lugar es acogedor buena temática mexicana y la comida súper rica. Buen lugar para beber y cenar.
reviews.textTranslated: I recommend it. The place is cozy, has a nice Mexican theme, and the food is delicious. A great place for drinks and dinner.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Muchisimas gracias por tu review, Brenda! Nos encanta que hayas disfrutado nuestra comida y ambiente! Esperamos verte de regreso muy pronto! :)

reviews.text: The guac, fish tacos and a classic margarita is all you need, hands down.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review! :)

reviews.text: Very good service. Drinks are great.  Tacos are great too just wish they would warm up the tortillas, would really take them to another level. Pass on the tortilla soup, not very good at all.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,
Thank you for your review! We will take your feedback into consideration. We appreciate it and are sorry you didn't enjoy our soup.

reviews.text: Love the guac. Happy hours is nc u can have a great deals. I want to know the recipe of spicy mayo sauce(great sauce). If you love mexican food n drinks , try this place
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Gracias for your review! We are very happy you have enjoyed our happy hour offerings. Unfortunately, the white-hot mayo recipe is one of our top secrete recipes!! We will make sure to always have the white-hot mayo bottle at your table for when you come in!

reviews.text: Expensive for what you get. Being given a time limit upon entry feels unwelcoming, especially when the restaurant was not busy. Food was good, but the experience was awkward, the menu confusing. Had to order sides just to get a full-sized meal. Very small margarita. We won’t be back.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Diane,
Thank you for taking the time to write us a review. We are sorry that your experience wasn't the best. I would like to invite you back and take care of the reservation myself. If you decide to give us another chance, please email me at anna@anejo.ca
Thanks

reviews.text: Loooove this place. My favourite happy hour in the whole city. The tacos are to die for!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review and love! We hope to see you back soon, Sarah!

reviews.text: This is a place I try to visit atleast a couple times a month. The happy hour tacos are great for their super cheap price.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hola! :) Thank you for your review and your loyalty! We are happy to offer a great experience every time!

reviews.text:
Unless you want food poisoning don’t eat here. As someone who used to be employed by this restaurant I can tell you that most of their taco meat gets left out in the prep hall for several hours without being properly cooled down. All the sauces and soups never get put into an ice bath to drop the temperature prior to refrigeration.
The executive chef acts like a 12 year old child that has learned to swear for the first time and is constantly berating staff that aren’t his “favourite”.
He is blatantly disrespectful to most of the staff and instead of choosing to help staff when they need help he puts them down.
This establishment seems to lie to the health inspector as they have a ton of flaws with their food safety procedures.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello Rhiannon,
Thank you for taking the time to write this review. We are sorry to hear that you didn't have a positive experience while working with us. We take these accusations very seriously, so I would like to investigate more into this matter. Can you please contact me directly at anna@anejo.ca?
Thank you,
Anna

reviews.text:
Amazing service and great flavors !
They bring you a verity of hot sauces without asking 🔥
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review, Umair!

reviews.text: Amazing! Love halfy hour! The margueritas here are the bomb!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: We have so many too! hope you get to try all of them! They are all so delicious! Thank you For your review, Victoria!

reviews.text: Great service, hospitality, and experiences.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review, Gaganjot!

reviews.text: The tacos are very very good and the guacamole made at your table.  Not to forget the great selection of tequila.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Nancy! We are very proud of our tequila selection so it is great you enjoyed it too! We, tequila nerds, must unite! We hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: Got 3 types of tacos as well as guacamole. The tacos can be served on flour or corn tortillas, filled with your choice of protein (chicken, pork, beef, chorizo, etc) and topped with Pico de Gallo. They bring a handful of hot sauces to the table too which is nice if you like to add something extra, I'd definitely recommend their spicy mayo. The guacamole was made fresh at the table, a little theatric but nice to see nonetheless. The guac and chips were super tasty and I was inhaling the tacos because they were so good. The prices are reasonable too, so I'd recommend if you're looking for Mexican cuisine
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: We for sure love our guacamole! Thank you, Logan, for our review! it is much appreciated. We ope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: We love the happy hour tacos here. The fish tacos combined with the house made horseradish mayo is what we come for every single time. The pork tacos are also amazing, and the guacamole is the best we have had. The manager and staff here are also amazing, we had a payment issue and they got it fixed quickly and also reimbursed us. We would 100% recommend this place to anyone.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your review TB! We appreciate your taking the time to let us know how much you enjoyed it! We hope to see you back soon!

reviews.text: Food was ok, drinks were great
First time here. Great service and great food. Went during happy hour. Half price tacos were delicious. Will definitely be back.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for the positive feedback Natalie, we look forward to hosting your next visit!

reviews.text: Bland and overpriced

WOW! If you like margaritas and taco’s you have to visit Anejo. We had a party of eight and they we very accommodating and the service was very quick. Ricardo and crew were amazing and the food was fantastic.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for the positive feedback amigo, we will make sure to extend a job well done to Ricardo!

We look forward to your next visit!

reviews.text: Such a great place! I love the feeling I get here, the vibe is fun and super comfortable, and the cocktails and vegetarian options never disappoint. Perfect place to bring a few friends or go on a date!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your review, Ana! Love to know you enjoyed your experience with us! We hope to see you back soon!
Anna

reviews.text: We always get the speedy Gonzales lunch! Yummmmmmm

Don't go to anjeos because the short black lady in the front will make up her own rules about vaccines and lie. We were fully vaccinated had our id/proof of vaccine and she didn't let us in! We were not expecting to be treated so badly after we have showed her all of our proof and documents.We have been long time customers of anjeos but they have lost our business when they hired unprofessional and lying employees like her. I'm disappointed.
Great atmosphere!  Fun vibe

I rated this place five because of its service. The staff is friendly—a very decent Baja fish tacos (4/5). I also tried the Ceviche (3/5), which was good, but I will volunteer with the chef to improve the recipe. The place needs a more Mexican vibe but still is a great one. I will recommend this place and will come back.
Fun little spot. I didn't know that there were so many brands of tequila. Great service and food. Can't go wrong with a tequila based drink!
Great atmosphere, food, and drinks. A Mission staple. Don’t miss halfy hour!
Huge tequila menu, tasty tacos and delicious Margheritas! Ambience is nice, music a little loud but overall good!
Food could be better
Best guacamole ever.
Great service, atmosphere, food, and drinks!
I love the food here.

My wife and I make up special occasions just so we can go here to have a nice meal together. If we're in the neighborhood and it's between 3:00 and 5:00 or after 9:00 p.m. we will stop by for their happy hour. Half price tacos and tequila. Do I really have to say more? Great atmosphere and very good staff. Definitely one of my favorite Mexican restaurant right now
Awesome food, wonderful vibe and fantastic staff. Love this place!

Kids allowed after 8pm here! (We weren't sure until we got there) Despite it being very busy and there being a wait (30 min wait on a Sunday night around 730pm), staff was very efficient and friendly and kept things moving along nicely. We were alerted that our table was ready via text. Pretty limited patio seating, but they do allow dogs. Once seated, our food arrived quickly and tasted amazing, as always. The waitress was very helpful and made some great drink and sauce recommendations. They offer virgin versions of all their margaritas too, which are unblended. Highly recommend this place for quality tacos and a great patio atmosphere.
Amazing place to eat. Drinks are on point. Tacos taste fantastic with good variety. And the guac is unreal. Do yourself a favour and check it out. Anejo size all the way.

This place is overhyped just because it’s a Mexican restaurant in downtown. I’ve been a couple of time over the past few years and I’m not sure why. Falling into the hype? The hostess is always kind and caring but the service afterwards remains subpar. Food is also meh. Table side fresh guacamole is a nice touch, only thing I would really recommend. Check it out for the hype and atmosphere, but there are better Mexican style restaurants out there if you’re looking for better food and service.

An incredible, local staple for all your Margarita needs! The constantly rotating feature flavours are fun, and ensure there is variety for any taste! Always a 10/10 experience with service and hospitality!
Have the chili coconut margarita

A fantastic Mexican restaurant in one of Calgary's trendiest areas.  Margaritas and table made guac are the highlights for sure, and they  also have one of the largest tequila selections in North America.

Food is a bit pricy for Taco's and a "pig out" taco night would be best had elsewhere, but if you want a fancy taco and cocktail anejo can't be beat.

If guacamole is your dish, you HAVE got to try this place. Freshly prepared at your table so you know you're not getting some 3rd party pre-packaged "stuff". The tacos are good and they have a very decent selection so you can mix and match. Some of the serving staff looked exhausted so show them some love and tip them well!!
Food? Great. Service? Horrible.

If you are one of those that thinks “a taco is a taco,” you’d be wrong! Not every taco is made equal, and the ones here prove that! A bite of one of these is a promise to your mouth of a great time! So come here. Get the tacos. Your mouth deserves it.
Always a good time! Great drinks.
Pricey
Amazing experience The staff are so wonderful. I highly recommend the guacamole and el carne! The peach margaritas were also super delicious
Amazing drinks and foods
Tiff made some bomb cocktails.
Excellent service and the food was fantastic, especially the guacamole and the peach margarita.

I am gluten free, and I love their tacos! The guacamole is amazing and the chili coconut margaritas are my favorite!! You can also get the margarita kits "to go". I've been known to order these even on Uber eats to take home after work 😂 I just wish they would remember to put the spicy mayo in my takeout orders... It "makes" the whole experience
Great food and cocktails
We made it just after for happy hour and they still gave us the half-off shots and Tacos! Fish was the best but they ate all good. 100% recommend.
Amazing food! Amazing service !
Always good food and drinks! Amazing tequila lineup too.
Atmosphere is great, large list selection of tequila I've ever seen, waitress was very nice as well.
Food was great, staff was awesome, we will go back

We had a terrific lunch on the patio - drank margaritas, ate tacos and people watched.

The food was excellent, served with a smile and the location is spot on - we'll be back :)
Gauacamole here is something else
Great food and of course the margaritas rocked!

I PAID 121 FOR THIS!!!! Im sorry to say but my experience was so bad, being a Mexican and coming to this place had just been so disappointing, my tortillas were cold, my tacos were dry and the molcajete which id 26 canadian dollars was such a disappointment as well, very small and not authentic at all. Overall very high prices for food that is nowhere near authentic for all. Salute to the chef for bringing us a complimentary dessert but nonetheless very disappointed I hope u guys see rhis and gimme a free margarita, your drinks were ok 😁
The cucumber cilantro margarita is incredible!
The Carnitas were amazing!

Meh. Having visited on a few other occasions I'd had a good impression going into Anejo. Unfortunately my last dining experience was not up to par. The service was decent, and the food was okay, but had the tacos been more than half price they wouldn't have been worth it. The meat was decently cooked, but meat and cilantro does not a taco make.  Some pico de gallo and some tomatoes would have been a nice touch. My ceviche had a bug in it, and when pointed out to the server she whisked it off the table, but didn't ask if I'd like it replaced or another dish in it's place. It was taken off the bill, but the option of something else would have been nice. Overall okay, but with price tag with so many other great restaurants on 4th St.
Outstanding.
Great food and great staff
Favorite place in the city. Some of the best tacos and crazy happy hour.
Had an awesome time here with hubby! Loved the margaritas of course and the guacamole!! Super authentic! We’ll be back soon!! 😉

For people watching sit at the bar, for more quiet, ask to sit upstairs. Margs are all good, made with fresh ingredients. Guacamole is a must have and they have a great selection of tequilas to try. Great spot for a friends night out
Great food.
Omg best guacamole, tacos and margaritas in Calgary! Especially enjoy the blood orange and strawberry rhubarb margaritas. Every time I've been the food and service has been excellent.
Super great atmosphere, excellent food and delicious drinks!
Great food!

Honestly, it doesn't matter about the rest of it, go for the guac. Heavenly guac. Made fresh at your table guac.

G U A C A M O L E
Authentic, delicious but a tad pricey.  Service was kind but it was very slow. Love the strawberry rhubarb margarita
Fantastic food and great tequila and tequila based drinks. Table side guacamole is a must! So far everything I’ve tried has been quite tasty. Will definitely be going back!
Real Mexican with class

Fantastic restaurant! I tried all the Classico tacos and they were fantastic! Spicy chocolate cake was also delicious.
Ambiance was fun and energetic, decor was quite nice, and the service was great!
Would absolutely go there again.

Anejo is more of a tequileria or mezcaleria, unfortunately we didn't had the chance to try the tacos. We started off with the guacamole and the fundido tradicional, which tasted really good. While having our drinks, which tasted okay, we tried the Michelada with Corona, the Ceasar Diablo and the featured Margarita. We ordered the molcajete de carne with a side of Tortilla soup and a mexican rice. The molcajete de carne  was not a good presentation, very salty and dry, compare to other places we have tried them. The rice and Tortilla soup didn't taste very good either. They don't offer any salsas on the sides. And to finish off we ordered the Churros, which seemed to be a little over cooked and the coffee was cold. I love Mexican food, but unfortunately this place will not be my first choice next time.
You gotta go here once. Food & staff both are fabulous. They have happy hour everyday from 3-6 & 9 - close. Drinks are fantastic here. If you're a Tequila lover then this is the place for ya !!
Great place, authentic!

The fish tacos were fresh and hot but every other taco we had was cold and the meat was dry. All the tortillas were falling apart and dried out and clearly had been sitting out for a while. Got the queso fundido as well, and it was a disappointingly tiny portion size for $18 (and the mushrooms in it tasted like from a can 😂). Drinks were incredibly forgettable and boring.
Look up their ownership! They have been acquired by Recipe Unlimited, a corporate ownership group which owns stand-outs like Swiss Chalet, Montana’s, and East Side Mario’s.
There are so many great Mexican restaurants in this city, most of which are locally owned, unlike Añejo. Save yourself some money and disappointment and avoid this place.
Birria Al Res... So, so good. Huge tequila selection and a fun vibe. Friendly, helpful staff. I ate way too much but regret nothing.

Went for lunch and had the lunch special (margarita, 2 tacos and guacamole) and it was great! I had a fish taco and a pulled porc taco with a blood orange virgin margarita. We sat on the patio and it was a nice experience! The hostess and service in general were a little lacking but it didn’t ruin our experience. The decor and atmosphere is great!
If you're a fan of Mexican food, and an even bigger fan of tequila, this is the place.
Great food
Margheritas were great and the good was fantastic too! I'm vegan and had the mushroom tacos, they were very tasty.

Honest local review: I’ve lived in the area for about 4 years and have been going to Anejo since we moved. Half priced Margaritas, beers are a great value. Over-priced otherwise. The tacos, only the pork is delicious, the chicken or beef is usually dry occasionally even cold. The molcajete is delicious and served table-side to your taste. Wait staff is attentive or when they’re not at least apologetic.

My reason for 3 stars genuinely is the overall customer experience. There needs to be a change in the overall policy for reservations. We’ve been many times with a reservation and usually seated indoors which can be fine. This time we did request the patio and booked a week in advance and were told it was only for waitlist walk ins. This makes no sense and the hostess should always ask if there was a preference prior to just sitting people in the loud and dark interior. There were 3 tables open on the patio and I had to literally beg to be moved to an open one. When we arrived, the hostess on Saturday June 26 at 3 pm dropped us off and when I went to ask her if we could maybe move to an open couple of seats on the patio along the rail she ran away! Avoided me when I went to speak with her, so I walked to the front where she was assisting other guests and for a third time completely ignored me and avoided looking at me standing literally next to her. Experiencing less than humane treatment I have experienced as a younger person frequenting high-end restaurants in Toronto, Dubai, Vancouver, Los Angeles and Las Vegas for example, this would never be acceptable and is not the first time we have been treated this way at Anejo. This is Calgary, and the food isn’t good enough to treat people this way. I tracked down another server and had her go speak to the hostess and we were moved otherwise this would be a 2 star. We got the table outside and the server promptly spilled water all over my partner. We love the margaritas and the patio but it is not worth the hassle and this is not the first time we’ve received a cold reception from the front of house. Please do better.
Always delicious, friendly staff

I called before hand and a lady picked up the phone and so I asked her what time did they close it was 9:01 pm she told me they will see  I wanted to spend my birthday there having a few drinks and maybe some food since I’m visiting from Montreal I actually drove 25 min from my place just to get there and be told that they were not taking anymore ppl and it was only me while they had a bunch of ppl there maybe because I’m trans or Idk but the guy was super mean to me and literally threw me out now I have nowhere to go because I made my plans to go there they just don’t care about you at ALL smh

Our first time going there with a couple of my friends for dinner. We ordered their shrimp and fish tacos, the shrimp tacos were too crunchy & too breaded and the fish tacos were soggy & didn’t have any flavour. It was just disgusting. Their churros were fried for too long, resulting in rock hard churros... On top of all that the waitress (Estrella) was not friendly at all. She must of had a bad day or she just didn’t like her job. Definitely won’t be going back.

Very unprofessional staff, lied about reservations. One person says no reservations,  another person says you were supposed to reserve in advance. In detail, I called them at 5:30pm and asked if I need to make reservations for 8pm today, the person named as Erin said we don't take reservations, only walk in, first come first serve. When I reached at 8pm with my family another representative named as Danny said you were supposed to make reservations ahead of time, so we can not give you table now. I explained her that i called few hours before and asked for reservations. Then I requested Danny to put us in a waiting list, as you are going to close at 10pm, we can wait no problem, she said in a rude manner you won't get seat. I was really surprised due to no customer service skills, no courtesy. So basically it is a complete waste of time, after 45 minutes of drive from home. No courtesy, unprofessional staff and 👎 very bad experience.

ANS TO YOUR RESPONSE: LYING AGAIN, INSTEAD OF ADMITTING MISTAKE: CLEARLY POOR CUSTOMER SERVICE SKILLS. LET ME REMIND YOU AGAIN, I SPECIFICALLY ASKED YOU, WHEN I CALLED YOU AT 5:30PM, CAN I MAKE RESERVATIONS, AS WE ARE COMING FROM FAR AWAY. YOU SAID NO RESERVATIONS, ONLY WALK IN, FIRST COME FIRST SERVE. PLEASE CHECK TELEPHONIC CONVERSATION AND STOP LYING.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello, Thank you for taking the time to give us some feedback.
I spoke with you on the phone originally and explained that we have some tables that are available for reservations, and others that we keep for first come first serve - these are the tables that we allow guests to be on a waitlist for, in person.  When we spoke on the phone, I did let you know that the restaurant was very busy and we could not guarantee a table would be available for you.  The reason that we don't always add guests to the waitlist later in the evening is because we cannot be sure if there will be space available, and we don't want people to feel rushed.  We would love to be able to accommodate all guests, but the reality is we have only 15 tables to service a restaurant that typically has roughly 75 tables this time of year.  All of the staff have been working very hard since reopening 5 days ago to welcome as many guests back as possible and I apologize that we did not have space for your group.

reviews.text: Servers were really nice and the guac was amazing but the tacos were awful. The shell was not heated up or crisped and was super dry, and most the taco flavours were average except for the crispy fried tilapia which I'd say is the only genuinely good taco flavour. I wanted to try the tres leches because that's a really big hit or miss. Defenitiely not with 30$ for 6 tacos that I could have matched at home for a Fraction at the price.

If Google will introduce zero star, they deserve zero. Food quality is not good, Calgary has much better places. Staff behavior wasn't very good as well. After one and half hour of wait, we finally got seats, tried few things. Most of the food we tried was average quality. My friends and I think Mickey's Tacos 🌮 are best in Calgary. Please don't waste your time and money here.
The front of house greeted us with a smile. He was very patient when we decided to switch tables a couple times. Loved their food and drink options. Magnífico!
Always a good time!
Perfect place for a night out with friends. Incredible food and love the vibe of this place! Ordered the guacamole that they make right in front of you and it is to die for! Can't wait to return!

Great place to chill, grab a beer and soak up some sun on the patio. Casual environment with fun and friendly service. Good people watching on 4th street and with half price tacos as a special you really can't go wrong. Go check it out, you won't be disappointed.

I should have written this review 7 years ago.    The margaritas here are the best I’ve had in Calgary so far- chili coconut is my absolute favourite 🔥   Best range of tequila at any bar in Canada I’ve been to.  Tacos are filling and on point.  Half-y hour is the best time to hit up this spot. Great vibes every time.  Also I do eat the pico right out of the bowl with a spoon 😉 it’s that good.  Anejo has always been my fave restaurant/bar to go to in yyc.
First time out in a long while. I had tacos for lunch,  they were awesome. The service was the best. Will return soon, thanks!
Our favourite spot to visit when we’re in Calgary. The foot is authentic and the margaritas... don’t even get me started!
Not bad
Food and drinks are amazing! Staff was super friendly.
Place is good

Great service! Excellent food!
Pricey but its a special event to eat out now a days! Sign of the times... I hope they item again soon so I can enjoy spending again!!
Must try the el Jefe 🙌
One of the best tacos in Calgary. And the selection of tequila is to die for.
Great tacos and must-have table side guacamole. Gotta try this place.
Sometimes a quaint but sunny patio is in order. Salud!
Came in after a long day traveling. Enjoyed a lovely meal with my girlfriend. Everything was delicious and the customer service was fantastic. Would definitely come back!
Love this place best guac and margaritas! Cool atmosphere!
Great ambiance, service and food.

Good food and I don't even like Mexican food. Fish tacos. Many choices. Don't even have to be fish, I was told. Very pleasant waitress. I only say pleasant because apparently any other word would be sexist. Fair enough. How about engaging, eh?  Let's talk about Tequila shots. Very smooth. I recommend this place. Really! Anejo means antique? Just started learning Spanish.
If you like quality tequila. Just dont bother with anywhere else!

The food here was great! Had the pineapple jicama salad and beef tacos. I wanted the tilapia but they said that they fry it in the same fryer as the shrimp, which I'm allergic to. I really appreciated that.

I was disappointed with the overall service, though. Waited for my food, it came out all at once instead of in courses. I was supposed to look up the menu on my phone but it's so tiny and you can't blow it up. I have some vision issues so had to ask for a regular menu. Took the waitress a bit to get that. And then I had to ask twice for the bill as I waited over 20min for it. I'll be back but maybe just for takeout.
Amazing food and great service!
Makayla was an amazing server !!! Definitely will be coming back !!! Great food and incredible service.
Great service! Delicious guacamole, and the tacos were amazing!
Best margaritas I've had!

everyone working here seemed really nice.
I came for my birthday dinner i felt really lucky since everything opened up again to dine in just the day before !   The blood orange margarita is delicious and deadly <3 well worth the drive in from out of town !

Fish tacos where horribly dry and hard to get down even being tipsy, but all the other food was absolutely delishious !
Best margaritas in town!  Definitely have the coconut chili Marg!
The best table side served guacamole in Western Canada, hands down.
Expensive, noisy

One of the worst experience I had in a very long time. The restaurant look is very pretty and great atmosphere. Server was nice but the service is pretty bad, slow and he didn’t come to us to see what we need. Waited for the food long time and when we got it , it wasn’t fresh and too spicy and way too pricey for no reason. The margaritas are not fresh and made of syrup and there is no option for a slushy Margarita. I have beens in few Mexican places in my life and I can say for sure that there is nothing automatic at this restaurant. I will never go back and I will never recommend on this place. Super disappointed.
Awesome that they make you fresh salsa in front of you. The young female server didn't seem to care about her job.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Calvin,  Glad you enjoyed your salsa!  Was there anything further you can share about the service so we are able to give some feedback to the service team?  Thank you,
Nick Hewton
General Manager

reviews.text: Welcome to Anejo - the spot where you can get heated drinks that will take your breath away and cheesy fundido that will keep you going! :) This delicious combination is always a delight, my favourite margarita being the chili coconut....
Decent Mexican. Wish it was more authentic
The best place in Calgary for a relaxed vibe, margaritas, fresh guacamole and tacos!

Ever since I heard about this place I knew I had to try it and experience their table side guacamole and watch it being made from scratch in-front of us, and let me tell you it did not disappoint.
We went on their happy hour which they nicknamed to “halfyhour” since all their tacos are half priced during 3-5 and again from 9pm till closing.

• Price: $$ (halfyhour)

We got the flight of six tacos. We had
• Chicken: ★★★★☆
This one was just alright nothing extraordinary there.
• Mushroom: ★☆☆☆☆
If you knew me you’d know that I always try to get at least one plant based item so I definitely wanted to try this one but unfortunately I didn’t like it at all. In fact I could’ve even eat past 2 bites and had to leave it.
The mushroom had a really weird flavour and the seasoning wasn’t it for me at all. The reason for it still getting one star is that it was cooked nicely and the mushrooms were tender and moist.
• Crispy Tilapia: ★★★★★
This was our absolute favourite one that we got the fish was just cooked to perfection and the coating was amazing.
• Beef: ★★★☆☆
• Pork: ★★★★☆
• Guacamole: ★★★★★
According to Erech it might’ve been the best guac he’s ever had. Which is saying a lot since he never makes that bold of an exclamation about anything.
Enchiladas: ★★★★☆

@mandeatz on instagram

reviews.text: Overrated compared to other options in the city. They will rush you to turn a table over and the menu is mediocre.
Delicious! The chili coconut margherita was so good and best guacamole. I hadn"t been in the building since it was 4th St. Rose! I loved it then and love it now. Highly recommend!
Nice selection of tequila and mezcal.
Super expensive for what they serve.
Good food choices, including vegan, also has a bar. Seating is inside n outside. Nice staff. Their website menu needs overhauling and mobile friendly it was difficult to read on phone

Atmosphere is good, video, over the brick bar creative, and service was ok.  Marg were good.......BUT food was terrible........I was a big fan of tableside Guac but way under salted and underwhelming.  Coconut shrimp, my wife liked, didn't try, the ceviche was VERY disappointing and terrible presentation, mixed crackers and 3 or 4 types types, never would order again.  We both had the steak, I asked for rare to med rare and received WELL done and the chimichurri sauce was terrible.  Of course the side of rice was piled on like the old days when Moxies started when the plate was full of fries to perceive value, and NO flavour! Asparagus wrapped in procuitto was best part of the meal unfortunately.  Of course all of this in 2 hour CoVid window and a Labyrinth maze to get out of the place in order to be under the time limit.  I know they have been taken over by a corporation, so it not much hope I'm afraid.

It's hit or miss with the tacos. I've had each one after a few visits. One was pretty good the others were bland. I don't know which was which since they looked identical and didn't taste like their namesakes. All were sloppily assembled. Nice, fun atmosphere though. Don't wear nice clothes because there's a good chance some of the taco innards will find a way onto your clothes.

reviews.text:
My husband had a good experience there with his company so we decided to visit again with a friend. Overall, a nice restaurant, cool decor and decent menu. We ordered their appetizers, the deep fried shrimp and cheesy jalapeno. The deep fried shrimp was very underwhelming, it looked like something you would get from a late night shawarma place, the presentation wasn't very good. The cheesy jalapeno was good in its looks, but lacked in flavour. To compensate, we ordered the ceviche  dish, which we each tried once and did not touch again. The waiter took the ceviche off our bill, which was nice. We mainly ordered all the variety of tacos. The tacos are really good in terms of portion. Seems like they want to stuff a lot of meat in. I can't honest tell the difference between the pork, beef, and chicken tacos, as I suspect they were seasoned Very much the same. The Tilapia and mushroom were decent. The Chorizo was underwhelming, and most of of the tacos were lukewarm. The one saving taco was the steak. Oh wow! It was really good! It came out in threes, and was clearly fresh off the grill. It was the best steak taco I've had. I'd visit just for this and nothing else.

In sum, get the steak Taco.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
We're glad you loved the steak tacos, all of our tacos are half price during our daily #halfyhour which happens 3-5 and 9-close every. single. day.
Salud!

reviews.text: I had a decent experience with some friends so I decided to bring my mom. And oh boy... I dont think ill be coming back. Service was mediocre at best. Table next to us that ordered way after us got their food first. And don't get me started on these churros! Now u may look at them and see yummy chocolate churros... but they aren't chocolate... they're BURNT!!! And way too much cinnamon. I'd rather eat tree bark. We asked for them to fix it and we got ANOTHER set of burnt churros but get this there was an added surprise! The inside was raw! :) nasty!
Good tacos! 🌮 🌮

Desepcionante, la verdad lindo servicio de las meseras pero la comida es de lo peor, los vasos estaban sucios, el pollo estaba crudo, demasiado tiempo de espera,  deja mucho que desear, no volveré este lugar.

Disappointing, really nice service from the waitresses but the food is the worst, the glasses were dirty, the chicken was raw, too long to wait, it leaves a lot to be desired, I will not return this place.

The service was quick, friendly and overall excellent. The skinny girl with dark hair, name starts with a c,or k,was absolutely wonderful. She gets 5 stars.  The food on the other hand was absolutely not good The vegetarian hotplate thing with cactus was bland and dry and tasted pretty much like store bought taco seasoning. The pork belly stuffed pepper was absolutely the weirdest dish I've ever seen. The pomegranate syrup and pecan sauce belong on a desert and the pepper had more raisins (seriously, raisins?) than pork. The server thankfully took it off the bill. Aside from that, the bartender in the red blue and white headband touched the front of his mask at least a dozen times and didn't wash his hands. Overall not great.
Good when its happy hour and good vibe but drinks are a bit too pricey

My wife and I were seated on the patio, on the sidewalk top on Saturday(Sept 7th)  around 730. I had heard good things about this place so we thought we have a laid back anniversary dinner. Sure it was busy but it was the food and lack of service that made the experience less than memorable, in fact if my wife hadn’t told me not say anything I would have talked to management about not paying for anything but the drinks.  The service was non existent so when my tacos came out I couldn’t even ask for pico or quac for 20 min. Tacos were slammed with meat and nothin else I couldn’t swallow without a drink. Ran out of coke never got the refill until I was ready to pay . I asked for the refill when I asked for a side of pico and quac for the tacos because nothing else was in them so 20 min my tacos are cold they show up with chips quac and pico... not sides but full orders. It wasn’t the waitress that brought them so I couldn’t even complain , she just said this was what was on the ticket. So we’ve been there for almost an hour, I couldn’t eat and enjoy the tacos, still waiting for the refill and was charged for full appetizers of pico and quac...

My pop then shows up so I ask about everything. I’m told it’s busy, that she’ll remove the order of chips  from the bill and to have a good night.

reviews.text:
I have never written any online review of any kind before, but our experience was so poor that I felt compelled to do so. Anyways, here goes...

Egregious on multiple levels. A harrowing experience. Do yourself a favour and go to Native Tongues (or anywhere really) instead.

My girlfriend and I ate here recently on a Saturday night. We had one cocktail each, and shared the salsa plus six tacos (shrimp and mushroom). An enthusiastic young man made our salsa in front of us, a cringeworthy process involving three minutes of slicing roasted jalapeno with the guys elbow within licking distance of my face... questionable management decision to have that routine go on... The tacos themselves were nothing to write home about; the mushroom ones were tasteless and served (to us at least) ice cold, the prawn ones were better but hardly worth the $8/taco price tag. The cocktails were decent and earn Anejo 1/5 rather than 0. We left feeling, in the words of my mild-mannered girlfriend "like [we had been] scammed". We will never be returning, unless it is to collect a refund for this overall miserable dining experience.

Meal was really good, but the vegetarian tacos one of our group had tasted like the mushrooms were old and out of a can. The other tacos and appetizers were excellent.
Loves the food here
Good Mexican food. Enjoyed the tacos and guacamole. Good place for a quick bite.
Usually in love with the place and Happy Hour. Took friends last weekend and the service was very disappointing. Left a stack of empties on the floor to make room.

Happy hour from 3-5PM everyday and they also do a late night happy hour as well. Half price tacos and $6 tequilas and margaritas. They have the best hot sauce and in house aioli as well.  Service is average, do make reservations for happy hour or you’ll have to wait a bit.
Damn fine tacos, drinks, and wait staff!!! Don't make the same mistake I did and wait so long before making it down there!!!
great chicken tacos
AMAZING food and drinks.

I enjoyed this restaurant! The queso and guacamole were the best part. Enjoyable beverages. We happened to visit during happy hour which was convenient! Tacos were on special so went with those as the main. Appreciate the fact that they have gluten-wise options (corn tortillas).
The tacos did lack flavour; however the other options we ordered and ambience still made it a 5 star experience. Would definitely return!
We sat at the bar and had great personal service from Samuel!
Good spot
Great margaritas and happy hour. Quick service and great food and drinks.

The food is alright and not a bad place to go if you want a fun night out, some decent mexican and a variety of tequila flights .. however, the last 3 times I came here I couldn’t even get seated. Twice there was a private event on weekend nights and one time they were closed before their hours stated online. Too much of a hassle for me to consider trying again.
Amazing food and atmosphere.
Meh, I don't get why this place is so highly rated. Service wasn't great, food was decent, not worth 4.5 stars. Drinks are good, but they'd better be for the top shelf prices.

I have tried the tacos a couple of times and I gotta say I was so disappointed. The beef had no flavor at all and was sooooo greasy. I honestly don't understand the hype. I had tacos at Leopold's and they were soooo delicious. Not a Mexican restaurant by the way. Go to Native Tongues or Blanco if you want amazing food with amazing flavors.

Great atmosphere, phenomena tequila and cocktails.  The happy hour specials are fantastic and the staff are very attentive and knowledgeable.  Highly recommended getting a reservation on busy nights as it is a popular spot.
Fav taco and tequila place
Love it

Not sure how this restaurant has such high reviews.

Yes, the tacos are delicious and appropriately priced, but the other food is seriously lacking in flavour.

The service was mediocre at best and the food and drinks were over priced.

We ordered the ginger coconut prawns, but never got them.

My friend had to return her pork belly because it wasn't cooked properly, wasn't crispy and just like eating jelly fat. We had to get the attention of the server to have this done because he didn't come back to the table to see how the food was. I know he knew we were impressed because he walked by the table a few times and clearly hear we weren't impressed. But instead of taking the initiative to see how things were, we had to stop him on the 4th time passing our table.

They had a large drink menu, but when you order a $10 margarita you expect it to be the size of a $10 margarita, not in a small highball glass filled with ice. We didn't get the option to have the margarita made with slush or on the rocks. Which would have been nice from a restaurant that's supposed to be authentic Mexican. I actually went to this restaurant with a Mexican and he said it is not authentic Mexican whatsoever.

They have a habanero hot sauce that is one of the best hot sauces I've ever had in my life!!!

The hot sauce with some of their white horseradish Mayo on a chip with some guac your taste buds will be dancing!!!
Fun place, great food and drinks.  A little loud
Some of the best Mexican in the city especially their guac.  And a happy hour that will make you smile! ;)
Great Tacos during happy hour. $6 Margaritas, not a great price
Had a fantastic time celebrating my bestie's 30th birthday party at Anejo on the weekend. Excellent service and tasty beverages!!

Very authentic Mexican food with a variety of dishes and tequilas that suited the atmosphere. The artwork and design was a particular strong point, I loved the feel of the dining and lounge and the servers do an amazing job being personal, engaging and helpful. I ordered a few different types of tacos and we had both the guacamole and salsa to start. To be frank the food was a little disappointing but still very delicious, the salsa was mainly just diced onion with not much base other than that, however the guacamole was fantastic. The tacos were ok but they could have used more seasoning especially on the beef tacos. Overall I would definitely recommend this place and go back to eat again. It's one of the best Mexcian resteraunts I've ever gone to.
Great staff, wonderful atmosphere. And the cocktails... The best. Can't really say any more. 😍
Great atmosphere. Amazing food and drinks. Best tacos I've ever had in my life.
Great atmosphere, ok food, over priced. may not be back as there are many other mexican places to try.

Had a team lunch after a long time and I'm happy to report that Anejo are still killing it with their top notch service, delicious food and selection of drinks.

The Taco's and Guac are still among my favourite in town!

I had been there in 2018 and absolutely loved it. However the quality of the food seems to have gone down. The guacamole which was the most amazing guacamole that I had before is now moderate at best.
They got thicc tacos and a great selection of drinks and hot sauces!
Food was mediocre and expensive
Love the fresh guacamole and tacos especially the $5 specials
Great Mexican food!
Respectable tequila list to satisfy most palettes, freshly made guacamol made table side in an intimate hip setting in a trendy part of town with knowledgeable staff and friendly manager !
Awesome food...great atmosphere!

This was a disappointing experience for us. This may be due to over hype and many other things.
This review is intended to be a constructive criticism of this establishment and nothing else.
After being told by many that this is the "best taco place in Calgary" my dining experience was a disappointment at best.
Our server was nothing to complain about but nothing more, and our greeting by the young lady who was seating tables felt uninterested and made us feel unwelcome, obviously something you don't want as a greeting to your establishment.
The pork, beef and chorizo were dry and unappealing, the chorizo being the best of all, but all the meat felt as if it had been cooked in large quantities and left until ordered. The tilapia seems like an odd choice for a taco fish as it was tasteless, tilapia is in my opinion a poor, cheap choice to serve in tacos, again jist my personal opinion.
These proteins filling store bought flour and corn tortillas made our "taco experience" disappointing. It felt as if the quantity over quality rule was in play. Yes the tacos were stuffed full, portion sizes are nothing to complain about if that is your concern. The tacos are not served with lime, again personal opinion but it felt strange as I believe a street style taco and a lime wedge go hand in hand.
In conclusion I left full of large portion sizes but nothing else, with the desire for the "stomach full of love" I crave when I seek out tacos.
After leaving and going to bed I woke up in the middle of the night with terrible vomiting, the food did not represent itself as so bad it would make me sick but it's hard to find another source of my violent discharge.
I don't consider one visit to this establishment enough to make a complete and detailed judgement, after all it's just one person's experience.
I hope that this review will be taken as an honest account of an overall bad experience, and will be considered as something to work away from. You guys should be proud of the popularity of the restaurant and use it as a foundation to build on, but in my opinion it will not last if the quality of food and lack of desirable service does not improve.
Great steak tacos. Better tequila.

It was ok. Service was good, friendly staff! Tacos were a bit disappointing! I was expecting more, like fresh chopped salsa on top of tacos and that slice of lime maybe would have been an extra touch to have it on the side!  I asked for sour cream and it was an extra charged of $2 😔!
Fun time, awesome fresh tacos but only thing is they don't open late during weekdays.
Excellent fresh guacamole! Tacos de Cameron was decent.
Food and service is good. Small cozy place and quite loud!! Marguaritas = excellent!!
Mind blowing selection of tequila, great food and atmosphere to compliment

I do not recommend Añejo.

Our waitress was incredibly touchy and flirty with my dad. We were there as a family for mine and my sister's birthdays, and it was obvious that it was a FAMILY DINNER. The waitress was flirting with my dad all night, and we ALL noticed it. Really uncomfortable. The tip was automatic as there were more than 8 of us at the table, too, so not sure why she was being overly friendly with my dad.

She was also incredibly abrasive. I wouldn't say she was RUDE but very unpleasant. I asked if they could possibly blend my margarita (personal preference), and her reply was "NOPE. We don't do that here. It's completely Mexican.", implying that they are such an authentic restaurant that they won't blend their margaritas.

My sister, who has Celiac Disease, asked the waitress if the tortilla chips are gluten-free and are made in a gluten-free fryer (to ensure there is no cross-contamination). The waitress responds with "YEP. They're corn."
Very very abrasive and almost snappy in the way she talked. Also, telling us that the corn tortilla chips are made of corn and therefore are gluten-free does not mean they are safe for someone with a severe wheat allergy. She didn't appear to have the desire to give us the time to explain anything to her and it was a bit of a challenge to have her double check things with the kitchen. BOTH my sisters have Celiac Disease, so these things are important to us.

As for the food, the portions were small. The flavors were OK but not the best I've ever had for Mexican food. Expensive for what the food was worth.

I will be spending my money elsewhere next time I want Mexican restaurant.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for the feedback, Vanessa. This is not the experience we strive to deliver and I'd really appreciate being able to follow-up with the team directly. Could you possibly email me privately with more info about who was serving you, so I can get to the bottom of this and hopefully make it up to you.
Thanks,
-Kate
kate@anejo.ca

reviews.text:
Definitely worth it during happy hour. All sorts of tequila to try for cheap during happy hour.

Tacos were great and table side guacamole is a must try. They do lack a good selection of hot sauce at least bring in El Yucateco I buy them from Walmart so they are available in Calgary.

Service was great and food came quickly.
So good! One of my favourite Mexican restaurants in the city. Go for halfy hour. 6 dollar margaritas and half priced tacos. Great atmosphere and always a lot of fun.
Food was great, not as great as our server Laine. Would go back just for her.
Popular place
The tequila is gnarly.

A place I keep coming back to. Great margaritas & fantastic tacos. Be sure to order the guacamole - the server brings out the ingredients in a porous stone bowl and mixes it up at the table. Fun to watch.
Excellent meal and good service. I would definitely eat there again.
Best guacamole, good food and El Hefe drink was very enjoyable.
Place was very nice and the food was incredible!
Great selection of tequila, a bit overpriced and the waitress/service wasn't all that attentive so the place lacks proper service.
Muy ricos los taquitos 😋😋
reviews.textTranslated: The tacos are delicious 😋😋

reviews.text: A cozy restaurant with limited seating. Best to make reservations and I believe they take reso during happy hour as well. Hard to get a group larger than 6 it seems. The happy hour menu is one of the best in the city for value and quality. The service here was good for being so busy and a full house. The quality of food was very good - flavourful and good size. Would highly recommend the fish tacos and guac here.

Pork tacos and enchiladas were delicious! Couldn't be happier with the food and the prices were reasonable but the service was rather slow. I'd definitely still go back because the food was spectacular!

The food sometimes can be a bit hit or miss, but the drinks are consistently delicious. Pork tacos, blackened cod, and the coconut habanero margarita are staples for me. Sometimes the table-prepared guac could go a bit lighter on the onions and tomatoes, and focus more on the avocado and lime. Overall great little spot for some tacos and tequila after work.
The happy hour tacos are insanely good
Great food great service
Unique decor, amazing wait staff.  Salsa and guacamole made fresh at your table.
Anejo, is one of my favorite places to go in Calgary.

Great atmosphere yet musical choice is more 90s hip hop than Mexican. Which im cool with. You will pay a higher price but in line with any good restaurant in the city, servers are friendly and helpful. Guacamole made tableside seems to be a favourite and the tacos are stacked with meat!
By far best Mexican food in town. They the margaritas and of course the guacamole is amazing.
Great food and atmosphere.

Ok, I've enjoyed Mexican food for a long time and in many places but this place is a treasure. The menu is modern and innovative and changes with enough frequency to keep things fresh. It's a winner for date night for sure.
Best tequilla menu in town!

The ceviche , guaco mole , and pork tacos were excellent . They need to work on their chicken maybe add some thigh into the mix BUT it is an outstanding happy hour AND lovely staff.
Great place to experience tequila flavors.
Great tasting food and atmosphere. Portions could be a bit bigger.
Great tacos

Recently visited Anejo and was quite disappointed. The server was great but that didn't complement the food unfortunately. The quality of the coconut shrimp seemed as though they were frozen prior and the beef in the taco was so tough, I had to yank on the taco to get a bite in. If you want the best tacos in the city, head over to Native Tongues, they know whats up!!
Sunday Margaritas are the best! Tacos are tasty, chill vibe on 4th street.
Stay away from their lunch special. The tacos were dry and flavorless.
Anejo's margaritas are great, but I especially love how they mix salsa and guacamole tableside!
Anejo is aleays amazing. Awesome vibe and their tacos are amazing.

This place is a Mission staple and partially I think that may be its issue also. If your after Tequila and margaritas. With great happy hour pricing then Anjeo would get 5 Stars all day. Bar staff is knowledgeable in Tequila and Mezcals and can help direct you to one worth trying. There margaritas are great and def worth trying. There food is where I find it lacks a bit. The guacamole is decent and the table side preperation is always a treat
. The remainder of there food however always seems to not measure up to the price point there after. I've been here a few times and sadly my response has always been meh....
Great food and their commitment to Tequila is impressive. Staff was very friendly and knowledgeable. Decor was also quite well executed.
Great Margs, underwhelming tacos. Nothing wrong with them, just dull flavour wise.

Go during happy hour otherwise this can feel a bit overpriced. Very good tacos and amazing guacamole. At 5$ a taco they have to be amazing and some were just good. Drinks were solid with some that were hits and some that were too sugary. Ambience is great, good service.

Highlight were the cauliflour taco, as well as the ginger or blood orange anejo
The food is ALWAYS amazing. Never disappointed.  The server (or kitchen) forgot about one of our items and brought it out at the end, however he took it off our bill.
The atmosphere is great, but the food is lacking. 3 star for the atmosphere.

Food was average, nothing I would go out of my way for. Service was horrible. Our server messed up our order, didn’t clear plates off the already tiny table, and didn’t even have a friendly attitude to begin with. This restaurant was highly recommended to us. Can’t see myself recommending Añejo or going back to give them a second shot.

What a great restaurant!  None of our group of 4 had been here before, and everyone loved the food, service and drinks. Huge shout out to Demi, what an amazing waitress! Patient, helpful, genuinely friendly- she helped me find a new favourite tequila. Favourite margaritas were chili coconut, Cadillac and guava. Shrimp tacos were delicious. We will definitely be back. Love the #haffyhour!
Amazing service and food! Cole was our server and he was awesome. Will definitely be back!
Great place. Best margaritas I've ever had! Staff are friendly and attentive. Great vibe
Over priced for the mediocre vegetarian tacos I received, which were also cold.
Lo mejor es la atención al cliente de los meseros pero la comida es mala
reviews.textTranslated: The best thing is the customer service of the waiters but the food is bad

reviews.text: Tequila flights are highly recommended

Anejo is one place I never get sick of. It has been a personal favorite of mine for several years now and I make a point of returning here as fairly often.
This visit they had a three course meal on special for 30 dollars with a selection of soup or salad to start, enchiladas or tacos for the second course and two deserts I don't know the name of to finish, being that I was with a friend I had the chance to try everything but the soup, and I felt it was a decent value for the cost.
Service was quick and food came out on time, but I found myself frustrated waiting for the bill at the end and we ended up waiting over 20 minutes. That said the experience was still great.
Every time I attend the place gets a little busier, and I think a reservation might be a must have on my next visit.
Amaizing Guacamole and cocktail, best Mexican place...
Friendly and quick service, lively spot, tasty but slightly pricey food. $29.00 for 6 relativity small tacos, $16 for guacamole with 1 1/2 avocados. Like I said: tasty but expensive for what you get.

The food was sub par. Makes sense since I noticed that John Leung works here. Guess he didn’t fill anybody in how he gets fired from all his jobs because he’s a rude, unprofessional, talentless ‘cook’ who lacks integrity. We will never eat here.
Good food but pretty expensive for what you get. Would love to see some better lunch specials!
Never been here before but it was amazing!
Always good, every time.
Amazing food and drinks. Atmosphere is great as well as the staff. I love tequila and can be picky, and I wasnt disappointed at all. Been a few times now and will be going back for sure.

During happy hour, the margaritas are totally worth it! The tacos were underwhelming. Barely seasoned and lacking flavour. To be a mexican restaurant and not serve fresh salsa is bizarre for me. The service was however very good and the decor was very cool!

Soooooo good!
Great spot for friends or a date!

TACOS AND MARGARITAS - what more can you ask for! Fun environment for a night out with family and friends. The margaritas are so tasty, and the tacos live up to the 5 star reviews. Start with the house made guacamole and chips; you won't be disappointed.

Love this spot! Best quac and chips you can ever imagine and this is just a started. My favourite spot is in the upstairs lounge. Highly recommend this spot if your are booking a private function! Definitely the best margaritas in town!
Super-knowledgeable staff, great environment
25 minutes waiting for any server to take our order. walked out. don't go on a friday night. they've bit off more than they can chew.
Fish tacos is a must.
Amazing ambience and nice service. Food could be better. But definitely worth visits.
Always good, and one of my favorites
Fabulous
Good drinks great food, not inexpensive though in fact a bit pricey

I hate to do this but  I had the worse experience  with food at this place, we  went there because they said that is a Mexican restaurant,   but the food is no even close to be Mexican everything was terrible  maybe for some people that dont know our food   will think that the place is good, but for any spanish person that want spanish food this is the wrong place.. y no tienen  cajetas  en los churrrooosssss  🤔🤔😤😤😤😤😤😤😤😤😤😤😤😤
The food here is great. Highly recommend the chilaquiles. Happy hour is awesome, half price tacos and margaritas. The chili coconut margarita is great.

Great quality of food and drinks. But the service can be hit or miss depending on your server.
But it definitely doesn't stop me coming back.
Evening specials are a great deal.  Always lively atmosphere.

I was here for the food, I love Mexican food but this was terrible, cold hard tortilla shells, and dry meats. Like reheated and left for a few mins to be served and delivered to the table crusty. The up side is you can dilute the food with this creamy white sauce they have in the side which was damn tasty. Churros, I get that their massive size but felt like just raw dough in the middle.
chili coconut margaritas. also, would buy white hot sauce by the bottle.
Loved the guacamole and the selection of tequila was great. Tacos weren’t the best but were ok.

4 of us out for mid week bite. Service and explanation of some of the dishes was great. Started with some fresh tableside made guacamole.  Both the fish and meat molcajete, fried cod, chili en nogada were mains. Service and presentation were great,  food a little bland for us. A little more spice would have been preferred by us all. Not a bad meal and worth trying out. Will be back to sit on the patio in summer, sip margaritas, watch the world and try some tacos.

Very cool restaurant with a great atmosphere and vibe. Service was great and prices are very decent. The margaritas were on the smaller and pricier side but it was very delicious!

The only thing we really enjoyed was the molcajete de carne. The meats were tender, the sauce was flavourful, and since it was served in a hot molcajete stone, the dish was hot until the very end! The chupacabra rolls were also decent, although it did not have a lot of flavour but luckily the sauce was tasty!

It was hard to enjoy the portobello tamales because the tamale dough was served to us cold hence quite hard, and the overall texture was just flaky and dry. We didn’t bother letting the server know as we were in a hurry to leave after dinner. The tilapia tacos were extremely fishy, which also made it hard to enjoy. We did like the pork taco though!

Not sure if we will come back for a proper dinner, but might stop by for drinks with friends.

Chili coconut margarita is one of the best drinks in the city. Likewise the guacamole and chips will blow you away.  Cool breezy place in the summer that somehow also feels cozy and communal in winter.
One of the best restaurants in Calgary.
Went there with a big group and nobody seemed to enjoy their meal. I ordered an arrachera (steak) which was served to me completely cold. I sent it back to be reheated and it came back cold again.

While the service was friendly and quick (it was completely empty besides us during sunday brunch) the main issues are: not authentic mexican food, uncomfortable/ackward seating, and an expensive menu. Margarita was great though and would be willing to come back again for a night drink and finger food; the aesthetic inside is very pretty
Fantastic margaritas, great guacamole, ok tacos
Nice place. Good food. Little pricy
Food was okay. The spicy coconut margarita and the service was good. The little stools are not the most comfortable.
If you like loud you'll like this place.
Great margs and tacos.
Must visit

I liked the decor, definitely more "modern Mexico.  Very busy on a saturday night, I dont think you could get a seat without a reservation.  Tables and seating are very tight, so the place is packed and due to that, pretty loud.
