If your looking for great drinks, loud atmosphere and good Appies, this is the place to be in the evenings. It’s a small place but decorated very well and has a multitude of delicious drinks. Unfortunately, We were not impressed with our main course meal. My husband had the 3 beef tacos which came with mushrooms and onions and TWO soft taco shells each(why?). So small, should be an appi, not on the meal dish menu. Didn’t have any flavour to them and he isn’t into spicy food so the hot sauces on our table were not helpful. I had the arrachera con esparragos. The waitress said it was usually cooked medium rare. I asked for it well done and with a side of guac. When it arrived I had no guac and my meat might as well have mooed at me. When waitress took my dish away she didn’t ask why my bloody meat while still on the plate. Tsk tsk.would return for drinks but not for a dinner meal.
Amazing service, staff goes above and beyond. Also super friendly and definitely the best tacos and margaritas in town
Really good guacamole! Very loud and the tacos are average.
Test drove a couple of quality Tequilas and had a great meal! Great vibe here...
Food, drinks and service were amazing!
Nice margaritas menu. Nice food
The price and value during Halfy Hour 3-5pm  and 9pm to close are well worth it.
Happy Hour all the wayyyy. Eat and get a little bit tipsie.

I don’t have enough words to describe how much I love this place. Their halfy hour is the best!!!! Table side guacamole is to die for! Cheap tacos during halfy hour and $6 margaritas. My favourite spot for Mexican food any day of the week! They have tremendous servers who are always cheerful and invite you in like they know you. Such a great great place!
Funditos!!! Do not go here if you are not going to get the Funditos! 🤤 Great atmosphere.
Really great place with amazing tequila selection.  Portions not big enough for 6'5" 200 lb guy.
Very good food, loved the margaritas as well. Would definitely come back here. Also, you can buy sugar skull pins and apparently belt buckles. Love the sugar skull.
Excellent!

We had pretty awesome service, guac was made fresh every order right at the table. The hot sauces were explained (and delicious), he never let a drink sit empty long, and he was up front to inform everyone about the tip being pre-added on each bill. It was a tad pricey and the tacos were quite small for the price but like most Mexican restaurants I find, some dishes are massive and some are small. Tables were very close together.
Excellent service today as always! They were quick to do their best to accommodate us even though they had a bunch of reservations coming in. And the server was pretty cute too 😉

Overpriced and tries to do too much but not doing it right. Had the trio of civiches and the were not good or done properly. If you are going to do something keep it simple and do it right. Don't try and do three if you can't do a simple civiche. It is hard to screw up tacos but they were as good as expected. Margaritas were good, i liked the chili coconut one but again doubles here 19 bucks, which is hard to justify for a simple drink like a margarita.
Overall the environment is cool but i was a little disappointed with the value. I guess my expectation for seafood coming from the east coast and spending time in mexico was too high.

The food was fantastic. The service was not great at all. Not rude or anything, just not with it. Had to ask for more drinks, ask to refill the empty condiment bottles, ask for the bottles back when they didn't return, ask for refills on water... It just wasn't good service.
Best Mexican in Calgary hands down! Everything is delicious and fresh. The tableside guacamole and tacos are must haves.
The double margaritas are delicious but also 19 dollars each, and they kept that a secret until bill time
Best guacamole in cow town
Good but $$$+ for the product.  It's like getting great street cart food but paying 80% more to watch them mash it up in front of you.
I learned a lot about Tequila while I was here. They have a great happy hour with deals on drinks and food. The Margaritas are awesome and I recommend a flight of Tequila.
Great spot. Fatastic Quacamole bowl made tableside.
Best happy hour in the city! Fairly authentic Mexican food, and an impressive selection of tequila and Mezcal cocktails.
Being a tequila fan this place has an amazing selection... service was amazing too!  Oh, and the space... wow.

This place has some killer tequila. Trid out nearly all of their margaritas, and none of them taste the same and all of them are distinct and incredible. The tracos I had were on the dry side and I felt like there needed to be some greenery of some pickled cabbage or something to liven them up. The meat was tasty though, and they were very filling which is a nice change from tacos at other restaurants which always leave you wanting more food to fill your tummy. Good service and the waiter's mustache was on point
Great selection of margaritas and tasty tacos. Very nice atmosphere with young crowd
amazing food and service and great location
Amazing mexican food and margaritas. Cool atmosphere
Food and drinks were awesome. Happy hour is a fantastic deal. You must try the guacamole.. its amazing!

Honestly,  i loved it. The food, drinks, service, atmosphere.... all of it was on point. I will definitely be revisiting more than once and recommend to anyone who is looking for a warm and friendly place to hang out. Service was excellent. Quick, attentive and a part of the experience itself. Thank you AÑEJO

I had their enchiladas! So good and very filling - not to mention gluten free! They did a good job not poisoning me since I'm a celiac. And the chilli coconut Margharita is next level delicious I crave it all the time. They have good customer service at lunch I would recommend going then for the best experience.
Quick service, excellent tequila cocktail menu and  delicious food.  Had the Chuptacobra Rolls and they were delicious!
Love the uniforms. The tequila speaks for itself.

The food was good but overpriced. My friend took me for my birthday and it was good until at the end when the bill got settled. The waiter asked if everything was ok with the service, we said it was, and then he proceeded to say “for a hundred dollar bill you didn’t leave a tip”. First off tipping is OPTIONAL. What we got for $100 wasn’t worth that price. Secondly, the service wasn’t above and beyond, he did his job, we were at the bar so it didn’t require much effort. Third off, I question if he would have made that statement to anyone else that didn’t leave a tip. We were good customers, didn’t complain, said thank you etc and didn’t deserve to be called out, worse in front other customers. It wasn’t his business to ask that because my friend paid and maybe didn’t want me to know they couldn’t leave a tip. Over all it left a very bad impression on me, and I’ll never go back.

Majority of people at our table did not enjoy their meals.  The rest of us thought that the value was poor.
Despite making a reservation, our group was set up on a table that was way too small.  We balanced tortillas on our laps as we ate.
I expect a better meal for that price point.  There are so many better options in this city.
Great vibe. Half hour prices outstanding
Best margaritas in Calgary.
Always enjoyable food
Great food and friendly service,  I will come back.
Excellent food, service, and obviously tequila!
Busy and noisy but good food and amazing service.
Delicious margaritas!

Bland and entirely unauthentic food. Nothing was fresh or interesting to look at. Very expensive for food and drinks for very basic fare. $8 for a small can of beer, really? Service was not really there. The best part, the minimum suggested tip is 18%.
Food was mediocre service was good the worst churro I have ever had raw in the centre

Very cool looking inside but that is where my good experience ended.  Unfortunately we got stuck at one of the many.... kids tables!?  Not sure why but they chose to put in several seating areas which sit not much more than a foot of the ground with rock hard chairs... To cap it off these are situated next to bar height tables meaning that you get to EAT AT THE BUTT HEIGHT of the people around you... yea....  The food was okay, I've had better Mexican around the city for a more competitive price, service was a bit slow which was excusable given that it was fairly busy, and the drinks were pretty good, earning the extra star.  After the painful and awkward climb up out of my child's seat near the floor, I tried out one of the bar height seats quickly to help determine if I would ever come back... not a spot I'd like to sit for very long.  I might go back for half price tacos/drinks but only if someone else plans it and I can sit at the big kids table...
Lugar cálido. Buena decoración,  alimentos de buen sabor y de buena variedad sobre la comida mexicana.
reviews.textTranslated: A warm place. Nice decor, tasty food, and a good variety of Mexican cuisine.

reviews.text: Service is great, spicy coconut margarita is the bomb and pulled chicken tacos. Come on. It doesn’t get better.
Great place to bring a group. Good atmosphere.
The best guacamole
Nice vibe to this place. I heard the hype now I believe it. Freshest Guacamole and salsa I've had in ages. They auto add tip so be careful if you have a group
Great drinks and food.
Great food, good service and even better margaritas. Delicious guacamole.
Wow wow wow. Amazing food. Great drinks. Awesome service. And wow wow wow so impressed with the gluten free and lactose free options.
Great food and service!
Guac is unreal. Great happy hour. $9 bottle beers peak times.
Really good food. Great place to go for margaritas with friends.

I went to Anejo last week for an event. We noticed that some of the avocados used were spoiled and asked the waiter to remove it before grinding them - he did not, which made the guacamole taste a little putrid. My friend and I ordered the stuffed poblano chili which cheese- it was bland and tasteless. There was no lime or any sort of spice - food in tacobell is way better. Service was poor - but we call got charged 25% approximately for tips as we were in a large group. This place might be good for happy hour drinks. For food, go elsewhere, unless you like it spoiled, bland and tasteless with a do-not-care attitude service.
Fabulous service and amazing food. Drink tequila of all kinds and their margaritas are wonderful
Great ambiance, good service, and pretty good food.  Coconut shrimp were delish, grilled fish tacos were great, and enchiladas were a bit undefined but also tasted good. Salsas were awesome.
Love it! Best guacamole I've ever had!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you Lyndon!
Thank you Namista!

reviews.text: Pretty good but Extremely expensive. 15$ for a cocktail that wasnt amazing. Not to mention slow serivce
Great food, excellent service ! Atmosphere is is a bit noisy and hard to hear conversation at your table.
Great Margarita! Tacos are delicious. Crowded and noisy

Guacamole was excellent. Tacos were mediocre, ingredients (specifically the meat) didn’t seem the freshest. Service was okay. The mango margarita was great tasting and the ambience was good and lively.
El servicio es excelente , muy buen ambiente  y la comida deliciosa.
reviews.textTranslated: The service is excellent, very good atmosphere and delicious food.

reviews.text:
Great place for friends and happy hour!!
The fish tacos looked great but tasted dirty! The fish wasnt the best quality, had better from them. Guacamole always fabulous!

Food was good and the service was great. We went for “happy hour” and the margaritas and tacos were half price, making it a very reasonable night out. I highly recommend the guacamole, which is made right in front of you at the table.
Cool vibe,  great food and amazing selection of tequila
Great food, great service. A bit pricey outside of happy hour. Must try.

The drinks are good! The food is really bad and kinda over priced too. I mean what can you expect from Calgary so I guess it is okay... Just get some chips and go drink a lot of tequila during happy hour.
My god best margaritas ever! The food is amazing.
Great food at a reasonable price in a relaxed atmosphere.
Lots of tequila,  take an Uber.
Great Marg's, quac and salsa...ask for Shaquish until November 11 then she's gone.... .best waitress ever!!
One of my favorite restaurants!!

Super fun place! It was loud with awesome music, super busy for a thurs night that we went. Not the place to go to if you want to have a lot of people and have intense chats, but very good food and hangouts!
The taco was good. But based on the price, I expected more!

I like to go here every once in a while. The atmosphere is nice, especially considering the other Mexican options in the city. The food is a bit on the pricey side though. I have recently gotten into good tequila and they have a great selection here!

Took my wife there for her birthday with 6 other people, the guacamole was great but sadly that was about it... The food was sub par andaover priced,  Service was terrible which I believe was because with 8 people the servers automatically get a 20% tip their give a shot factor was at zero, the first drinks took 20 minutes and ever drink after that was a long wait, then we had 1 server take 1 order then walk away, 10 minutes later a second server came by and took the rest, we told him to make sure the first severs order was cancelled he said he'd take care of it but when the bill came they charged us for it, we asked the server and he didn't remember us asking him to cancel, and the manager said no to taking it off the 800 dollar bill, it was an 18 dollar app, lol like come on, so I won't be returning, I DONT RECOMMEND!
Love coming here! Always great food. Guacamole is amazing!
Good alcohol. Tacos were decent

Our waiter forgot to bring my main meal because "the table was too full" later after the meal was brought I couldn't even eat it for a long time since the molcajete was as hot as fire. I was expecting more taste.. disappointed..

This restaurant is an authentically higher-end Mexican restaurant in Calgary.  The tequila cocktail menu (and bar) is extensive and innovative. You can expect all your favorite standards as well as some tequila-fruit-spice combinations that will amaze you. The food is good, but is not the high point (note the cocktails). The full flight of 6 tacos was a great way to trial the restaurant's flavors with a reasonable cost. The lamb shank was good, but the risotto was not very good - the whole dish was not very "Mexican." Great place to gather friends in a lively, cozy and talkative environment.
Very good food. Staff extremely friendly. Good to visit during happy hour to try cheaper food and drinks. Highly reccomend!

Ambience was nice, and the decor was cool. However, we were meeting friends there, and the music was just way too loud for chatting. The food was just okay. Portions were a little small and the flavour was lacking. Sorry. But just 3 stars from us.

Luise was one of the best bartenders I have seen in a very long time. I have been in the bar biz for over 20 years. His cocktails are UNBELIEVABLE. I had a few of the appys. So good.. you need to come here!
You can't beat the fish tacos or the half price coconut mojitos during happy hour
Great room, great food.
Almost no options fot vegetarians. Over price guacamole. Good service.
Amazing attention to detail

I wouldn't say the tacos are "authentic", but they're delicious. And if you're not going at dinner time, they're half price, which make them taste even better.
Also had the molcajete, and that was good, but I prefer the tacos.
Also good atmosphere.
Amazing atmosphere and food.
Nice place to take a date mixed crowd friendly service
Great margarita and food!
Great place. Great atmosphere, and amazing service

Ra cha cha!  I ❤️ Anejo.  Their tequila selection is outrageous.  Never a bad experience in this place.  I love who they have the guacamole and salsa in the lava stone right at your table.  They make it exactly how you like it.  Really fun and upbeat atmosphere.  The entire place is electrifying.  Hard to not have a good time here.  Just such a fun and interesting environment.
The best. Great drinks and great food
Super busy, but the staff were fast and attentive. Great food and drinks. No complaints from a table of 12!
Happy hour is the best.
Tequila! What else is there to say?
Great food and excellent margaritas
Taco's were amazing, so were the margaritas. Caeser was probably the spiciest I've ever had without being asked how spicy I want it.

TL;DR - if you like tequila, then you need to check this place out. The sheer volume of tequila is nuts. Also get their guacamole, it's delicious.

The staff super friendly. Food is tasty, the restaurant is just really nice to sit in and the tequila selection is top notch. They make awesome guacamole and is a must have for starters while you ponder over their menu. I usually stick towards their taco and have been satisfied. I wish they brought back their red tuna taco because sweet zombie Jesus those things were delicious but hey, they have them as a feature from time to time so not all is lost!

These guys know who they are and they so it very well!

It’s Mexican food that’s good in Calgary. Good tacos good taco soup I get my tacos in lettuce wraps when I go here. Service is awesome I just don’t like how cramped it in in the restaurant I wish it was more spacious I don’t like hearing the conversations of the 2 couples beside me
Pleasant and attentive staff. Food and cocktails were great.

One of the best tequila bars in the city! Love their late night happy hour and all the tequila options. The tasting flights are a really cool option and are even better during happy hour! The homemade guac is delicious and the perfect appy. Will definitely be coming back.
Great value tacos and cocktails during happy hour.
Good food! Excellent margaritas. Fun and modern space. Gets noisy when its crowded.
과카몰리와 타코를 먹었는데 과카몰리엔 고수가 들어있는것 빼곤 맛있었고 타코는 퍽퍽합니다
reviews.textTranslated: I had guacamole and tacos, and the guacamole was delicious except for the cilantro in it, but the tacos were dry.

reviews.text: Amazing food and even more amazing tequila. Their margaritas are the best 👌

Slow service when they were not busy. Took about 5 minutes for the server to come as take our drink order and about 10 minutes for him to bring it to us.

I got the Anejo Mole chicken which was a disappointment. The chicken was fried and topped with too much tomato sauce.
Excellent!
Awesome food and service

The tequila choices here are astounding. I'm not much of a drinker, but I was here for a friends bday and another friend and I waited for the others to arrive and sampled some fine tequila at the bar. If you love authentic mexican as well, this is a nice choice. Go check out the upstairs too! It's a Well designed architectural space with nice design elements, it enhances your experience. Only 4/5 because since we were sitting on the upper floor for the bday the service was intermittent. Welldone besides that!
Nicework!
Huge tequila and margarita selection and the guac is to die for! Great atmosphere. Small Patio.
Good food and great margaritas, the Cadillac is my favourite. Wait and hosting staff sometimes hit and miss. Nevertheless will always stop by for marg deals.
The Happy Hour Ahi Tuna Tacos are a steal at $10 for 3 tacos. The tuna was beautifully done and tasty.
Delicious but pricey. Entrees cost anywhere between $15 and $25, with apps costing 15-18
This is a good cafeteria style Mexican restaraunt a little pricey but good food and service. Peak times may be waits up to 15 minutes. Would recommend them.

The service was good enough, but not memorable. Very by the books and right to the point, with no sort of friendly vibe.

The tacos were fairly average. They weren't exceptionally savoury, nor sweet. I shared tacos, and I tried the pulled pork, the chorizo, and the tilapia. The tacos don't hold a candle to native tongues, in my opinion. I wouldn't have a problem with them if they weren't so expensive. $30 for 6 tacos doesn't seem very expensive, but when compared to native tongues' tacos, which are $3.75 a piece, and absolutely melt in your mouth, there is no contest in my eyes.

We only ordered one order of 6 tacos between two people, because we honestly felt that it wouldn't be worth it to order another round at $30.

Overall, I don't see the value in their tacos. They were unexeptional, and the price was higher than the best rated taco place in Calgary (native tongues).
Authentic Mexican Food. Great Ambiance.
Guacamole, tacos and margaritas. The best.

This place is probably great for happy hour, but the tacos are pretty bland and unimpressive, so it’s really not worth the full price.

Their margaritas are pretty good, and there’s a lot of different flavours and types. After a few of them I bet their tacos are the greatest thing on earth.

One interesting thing is that they make the salsa and guacamole fresh at the table, but the portion of salsa is so tiny and extraordinarily over priced. Definitely would not recommend this place and will not be returning

Honestly one of the best spots in Calgary! The food is absolutely incredible (the table side guacamole and tacos are a must) and the drinks are equally great. The service there is friendly and attentive, while the vibe is casual and fun!
Just had drinks, so not reviewing the food here, but the tequila and mezcal selection was awesome. Highly recommend.
My favorite Mexican restaurant. Great tacos and best marguritas
It was okay at best. Chicken meal was tasteless. Prawns were cooked to rubbery masses in my taco and service was slow....everything was over priced. We wont be going back.
Food was good service could have been better.
Great margaritas and food
Very helpful staff but the space is dark and loud and I wasn't too impressed by the food.
Authentic Mexican food! And the margaritas are amazing. Also the fresh guacamole made right at your table is definitely worth it.
The staff were incredible and so was the food. My group had a great night.
Service was poor, and food was OK. Nothing to write home about.
Decent food but make reservations or you won't find a place to sit.
Awesome Mexican, good tequila selection, the guac is great!
Margaritas are great, and so is the guac!
Service wasn't great, and very slow. Food was only okay. Would go back only if somebody else planned it.
Had an amazing time here, Adam stopped by and helped us to pick out our tequila of choice. Kate also helped us out with our margarita the chilli coconut is a go to I would highly recommend to anyone.
Large tequila and mezcal selection (including blanco/reposado/anejo flights), great tacos, and great guacamole.

Last call for food and drink is 30 minutes before close so keep that in mind!

Update - went in for happy hour, the food is ok for half price. Flavors aren’t particularly amazing but pretty standard. The service was adequate. I’ll probably just go other places for Mexican.
Best. GUAC. EVER. and great cocktails.

I liked this place in the past but my most recent experience was not very good. Decided to go here for a quick snack and margarita with my girlfriend on a Saturday afternoon. It was 10 minutes before 3pm Happy Hour. We we're greeted well and got seated table right away. We asked our server about the difference between the lunch special and happy hour and she said it was "about the same" as she tried to pressure us to order right away. We looked at the menu ourselves and found the lunch special includes 2 tacos, mini-guacamole for $14 plus $6 margarita option while happy hour has $2.25 tacos and $5 margaritas so way cheaper. Turns out our server ended her shift at 3pm. We also decided to ask for no straws to see if they were at least concious of the anti-straw movement. Both our drinks still came with straws. Seems like this place has become pretentious and only cares to cater to it's loyal Mission regulars.
Amazing food and staff!!
The guacamole made at your table was delicious as was the salsa and assorted tacos we sampled. They had the best margaritas I've ever had. Definitely a place I will return to.

Hipster Mexican spot, crowded seating, hard to hear each other so tough to go with a bigger group, food was decent - I'd say go for apps and tequila with a small crew otherwise there are better options in the area

If you like tequila and Mexican food, this is your spot.  Amazing tequila selection.  The guacamole is fantastic.  One day I'd love to try one of the  $500 per ounce tequila's. They have affordable tequila too, great range.

The coconut chili lime margarita is one of the greatest and best margarita ever. Table made quacamole is great but I can't give it 5 stars for a Mexican restaurant in Calgary as that award goes to Native Tongues.
Fantastic service... Even better atmosphere

Greatness esta Lada del cabo
Me so tango.
reviews.textTranslated:
Greatness is this Cape Lada
I'm tangoing.

reviews.text: Anejo has a great happy hour. The best taco I had by a mile was the pulled pork!

One of the few good Mexican places in Calgary. It’s got everything you’d want, chips and guac, tacos and tequila. It’s a cool spot, with a nice patio. When it comes to the food you won’t feel like you are in Mexico but for Calgary it’s pretty good.

The guacamole is made fresh at your table and is to die for.
The food and cocktails were all delicious although a little pricey.
We felt like we just visited Mexico. Authentica y Bueno
All good! Happy hour yay!!
Always good, pricy tho!

I had heard a lot about Añejo ages ago, with friends raving about it. Finally I decided to check it out

I liked it but it didn't stand up to the hype.  There wasn't anything particularly special about it.

The food was good - they offer several different kinds of tacos. The tacos are good, but there are better tacos in the city

The drinks are more where Añejo shines. The margaritas are fantastic.

Overall a good bar and restaurant.
Over priced, food is just okay, service is slow
The guacamole and tacos were great, snagged a spot on the patio with a buddy, would come back in a heartbeat!
Great guacamole and tacos
Best guacamole I’ve ever had. Prepared fresh right at your table!
Loved the tacos
The food was good, the dessert was great, and the margaritas were awesome. Good environment, and okay prices.
Decent.

Good little spot, great location, somewhat pricey, friendly staff though, didn't try the food as it was 8.50$ for a can of beer.

Plus side is they seem to have half price happy hour which helps!
There's no better place in Calgary for tequila cocktails
Food and drinks quite good, service average

Great happy hour specials, 1/2 off margaritas and tacos! The guava margarita is delicious with a pureed texture that allows for great mouthfeel. The tacos are larger than NT although less intentional and complex. In particular, the crispy tilapia is a nice fish taco with better accompaniments than the others. The pork has a slightly sweet BBQ taste... but kind of in a good way! It's also nice to get to customize what you want on the taco like cilantro, hot sauce, etc. I think most of the tacos are good enough that anyone could down a bunch of them :) The tableside guac is also a nice added touch.

Great vibe to the place and there is indoor multilevel and outdoor seating.

Service is more hit or miss. The competent servers are fantastic and explain each hot sauce to you, make awesome recommendations and keep your drinks topped up. The not-so-great ones have touched the tips of the hot sauce bottles (where the sauce comes out) with their fingers while describing them as "hot" "hot" "mild." All in all, I'd come back time and time again for the value, flavours and vibes.
I would have put 5 up but they have taken the nachos with chipotle so I've dropped it.
Da bomb dot com
Great guacamole and margaritas, they make the guac right at your table!
F'n good tacos.
Nice drinks
Amazing margaritas,  dry tacos.
Halfy hour. 3-5 pm half price tacos and drinks.great place for after work chill time
The spicy chilly margaritas go great with the fresh Guacamole, if you're into guacamole.
The margaritas are the best I've ever had.
Happy hour pricing is worth. I like their fish and mushroom taco. Guava margarita is really good.

Great happy hour for tacos and classic margaritas. Tacos were tasty with lots of meat on it. Awesome price/portion and quality for tacos, though may be not quite authentic tacos, but anyways great deal.
There specials are good value. Ceasers are hurting though.
Food and drinks were AMAZING however our server ruined the experience. Was not very happy and didn’t seem very accommodating.
Good food
Excellent tacos and tequila!
Tacos would be better as a side, unless they were larger. Enchilada is amazing
great food and atmosphere
Food was delicious but the menu is on the expensive side
Best tacos in the city. Taco time can pass off.
Have been here twice now, and I don't think 3rd time is an option for me personally. Overall the food is unremarkable and very pricey for what it is. The Caesar was good though.
I remember their tacos as being better than they were yesterday.  The beef was dry and lacked flavour.  I'll give it another shot, though, because I think they're usually pretty good.
Some of the hardest working and most knowledgeable staff I've ever come across

Parking in this area is a total nightmare, but the food here is seriously incredible, a little expensive but worth it. I definitely recommend the guacamole to start and the Tres Leches for dessert is to die for. The service is also wonderful, we sat at the bar under the big skylights which I totally loved, and the bartender serving us all night was really nice and on top of things.
They have happy hour every evening. Decently priced good food.
Great tasting Mexican food with amazing drinks! I had the blood orange margarita and it was outstanding and the atmosphere was also really nice
Great happy hour!
Pricey but great tacos and margaritas.
Great place, the guac is killer, and the tacos and tequila, during happy hour, are delicious!!!
Super awesome food and great atmosphere!
Great margarita.
Ricardo was a fantastic server. Will be back for sure. A great time for sure with exceptional cocktails.
The margarita selection is outstanding. The presentation for their guacamole is also very good. Be careful, it can get very busy. Book ahead.
Great food!

The guava margarita is the best margarita I've ever had, definitely give it a try. I had some tacos (beef, tilapia and chorizo) they were also very good. And the guacamole was fantastic. I didn't know that they would mix it up right in front of you so that was a pleasant surprise. Overall, this is a great place. Staff was very friendly and the food was great.
It's yummy and the staff is super nice
Amazing authentic mexican!  Soooo much tequila  🌮🥃
Delicious!! Great food and good service.
Average Food. Good Drinks
Guacamole was out of the world...mind blowingly awesome
Good is great drinks are awesome. But little pricey

My go to spot for margaritas and tacos! They have many flavors for the margaritas and I have yet to be let down. This restaurant is very trendy and has a nice vibe albeit kind of dark inside. Overall its very good. Happy hour pricing just makes everything worth the trip.
Always have great Margaritas!
Awesome guacamole( made right in front of you) and even better margaritas. Go between 3-5pm as that's when it's their happy hour.
Signature cocktails were amazing.
Best place to go for tacos and margaritas. Best mexican restaurant in Calgary.
Great taco!

Great place, lots of good tequila, even some ultra top shelf stuff. Really the only place in Calgary like it.  Get the guacamole, they make it at your table, it is so fresh. Their food is really well prepared also.  Margaritas! Tequila Caesars!
Great food and service.
Service meh.

Not being familiar with the menu or food and having good intolerances, the waitress was extremely helpful in choosing just the right meal!
Very tasty and satisfying!
Great food, love the fish tacos. Friendly staff and drinks are always on point. Great "halfy hour" 3-5 and 9-close
Wow margaritas!!!..... And the food worth it.... Like
So loud could fart at the table and blame the girlfriend
One of the best Mexican restaurants in western Canada!!!
Fantastic cocktails, amazing guacamole, mediocre entrees. Worth it even just for the cocktails.
Awesome, good atmosphere and authentic food
Great ambiance. Great food. Molcajete authentic. Great selection of Tequila.
So delicious! Gotta love the cheap tacos and drinks after 9pm!! Win win!!
Delicious Mexican food. The made at your table guacamole is a must have.
Fairly busy but justifiably so, great food with a fun atmosphere. Happy hour has good prices and the selection of margaritas are really good. Patio in summer is super fun to people watch.
The guacamole! That's why you must go! Service is great too. But it's the guacamole that will get me going back!
Great tacos, great sauces, great drinks
Such good food, drinks are amazing! Staff is next to none top notch:)

Great spot to celebrate Cinco de Mayo... That would be five stars... But the rest of the experience was dulled by the fact that it is OUTRAGEOUSLY expensive for what you get...a $19 short margarita...three small calamari tacos with nothing but a tiny bit of cabbage and together contained perhaps two ounces of calamari, for $20.... nearly $7 a piece! Unless you just HAVE to be there for some odd reason, seek elsewhere... You can do better!

Awesome experience. Our server Kate was really friendly and had some awesome suggestions. The food and drinks were also on point. I had chicken and pork tacos and they were very traditional Mexican. I would highly recommend this place to anyone.
Nice place, good tacos and tequila! Service was adequate. Cheers!
Great drink menu
I love going here. It's spendy though, so the value of tequila and tacos does drop sharply outside of happy hour, which is great.

From the minute we entered the restaurant I felt as though we were being hurried out. I had set a reservation and when we arrived the restaurant was pretty quite yet we were sat right beside the main entrance and told we had an hour and 45 mins to finish up at the table till the next reservation arrived. Our server came to the table and just looked/seemed like her was hating his life. He only spoke the bare minimum he had to, to us he and would just slap the plates on and off our table with out asking anything. But to other tables it looked like he was more interested and helpful with them. The EXPENSIVE margaritas arrived at our table and for the price we paid were made poorly. The food was the only thing that saved this dinning experience the guacamole was awesome and the tacos were great. I would never go back to this restaurant. I’ll go to blanco next time.
Fish tacos and the ginger coconut shrimp appetizer are really good. Little loud in there but fun atmosphere.

My experience here is usually average. I will say I'm not a fan of tex-mex, but appreciate more fresh Mexican or South America foods (aka lime, lemon grass, grilled fish, etc. ). Ordered the gracamole, they put waaaaaaaay too much salt in it. The tacos I ordered were fine (fish and veggie). I didn't hate it, but nothing to get excited about.

I will say on the plus side, I LOVE their margaritas here (blood orange) and they have some good tequlias.

On the downside, the service was pretty average and just not very friendly. They just were.

Probably wouldn't voluntarily go back for food due to service... But if someone invited me to go, I would.
The food is delicious, but very expensive. A very popular and busy place.
The food is so good and the service is even better! We will be coming back for sure.
This place is good for groups or just a date. It is pricy though.
The BEST margaritas! And you can order them by the half jugs ;)

We had an amazing time with our new server Tyler.  He was obviously new to Anejo but went out of his way to make us feel comfortable and informed. however when we ordered the guacamole for the table we had a different server “Sam” was extremely rude. We asked him what he was doing when he began to mash the ingredients ( as in.. what are you mixing together) he said with a roll of the eyes “ I’m making guacamole. I can’t express how rude it come cross and how stupid it made us feel. Well we just had to get over that and move on with our meal, so we ordered a flight of tequilas,  which our amazing first server delivered. When we were ready to take our shots Sam asked how we were doing, we asked for some lime to finish them off and one for our super bland guacamole. He brought them over and said “you know these fine tequilas don’t need lime.” We said “oh okay thanks, we also needed it for our guacamole” and he got angry and said “ well then why would you lie??” It was  extremely awkward and we didn’t know what else to say so we grabbed our bill and left. Don’t think we will be back due to the awkwardness from the one server who made us feel like trash. Tyler, you’re awesome though!!
The vibe here is super dark and sultry and the margaritas are to die for! Busy spot though - make a reso!
Love this place! Yummy drinks and food! Sad that they took the crusted tuna tacos off the menu though. Love the atmosphere. Reservation recommended here!
Very loud and very expensive. Mediocre food when it comes to Mexican. Guacamole is very good and service was excellent.
Great meal Tacos are king. All soft corn or flour. Great margaritas,and of course beer, and tequila. Pretty loud but part of atmosphere. 2 levels and small outside....great churros.
Food was great. Beer was great. Friends was the best!
Short rib appy fantastic! My favorite bevy  tequila what a selection, tasted the exclusive to Anejo restaurant silver blended Patron. Very nice our waiter Ricardo was always nearby. Great evening.

Anejo probably has the best tacos in town (have not found a place with better shrimp ones) and an amazing selection of Tequilas. It's more in the expensive side but the food is so so fresh (guacamole made in front of you and that kind of thing). Service is average (not bad but nothing special) and the venue is pretty stereotypical (mexican skulls and crosses all over, but it is cute with dark walls). Great place for small to large groups, but definitly a sit down kind of thing. Happy hour (3-5pm) is absolutely worth it with more accessible pricing on tacos and tequilas.
Did you see my video of them making fresh guacamole at your table?
Great food, good atmostphere, a bit pricey
It was great but the prices are just a bit too high for my liking.
Food is great and service is good. Pretty small space so seating is very squished and music is so loud you can barely hear the people at your table.
The foods excellent.
Great food, the best guacamole, and awesome tequila list. What else do you want?
Delicious food, tasty drinks and great service!
Good mexican food.
Great food and great cocktails. The atmosphere is fun and I love the art everywhere. Great place to catch up with friends.
Great food, drinks, atmosphere, and staff!
Amazing food!

Amazing food and service. It always tastes so fresh and the cocktails and mocktails at this place are ALWAYS amazing. I love that they bring the ingredients for the guacamole to your table and make it in front of you. Doesn’t get much fresher than that! Tastes amazing and the portions are perfect 👌🏼
Overpriced and underwhelming.
Great place to go on a night out.
Mucho mexican
reviews.textTranslated: A lot of Mexican

reviews.text: All types of tequila and good tacos.

One of my never fail places in town. Never had a problem with the service, and the liquor selection is great. Local tip, sit at the bar and let their bartenders show you a thing or two about GOOD tequilas (even pairings with your food)
Absolutely delicious! Halfy hour is awesome too!

Lots of hype, and lots of salt in the guac. The tacos we're just okay. The margaritas is just about all this place has going for it. Not sure how it stays so busy, especially with the price they are asking - 8 dollars for a Corona bottle seems excessive.
Cadillac classic marg! Guacamole is a must.
Best fresh guacamole!
Amazing selection of dishes and drinks; pricy though.
Always fun place to go and have great margaritas
Great food. Great drinks.Terrible chairs at the high top table.

Such hype and it was terrible. Not enough staff so no one came to our table for 20 mins upon sitting. Wanted to get back to back drinks but the service was terrible so we could only order 2 and they took an hour. The guacamole was really bland, salt is not an enemy. Although table service guac is pretty cool.  Margaritas were not that great. Overall pretty disappointed not sure if we'll come back for a do over.
Miles was very knowledgeable about tequila and made the night a great experience!!
Cilantro and cucumber marg and chili coconut marg - wowzaaaaaa!
Good food a bit pricey for what you get is all.

Ambiance is the most important factor for a bar (in my opinion). Joyful environment, music, decor & etc. This place is one of the best in that regard. Food is also very good. I am sure it will satisfy most tastes. Try guacamole, they make it fresh in front of you... Service is good as well. My impression is that this is mostly a place for young people. Pricewise, it is reasonable considering what it offers but it is on the expensive side. I am very pleased with this place.
Was  a bit of a letdown to be honest, some food is good, but overall the sauces were what made it good
Solid place! The atmosphere is dark, chill, and romantic, the servers are super nice and fast, and the food and drink is freshly prepared with lots of attention and care!

While the food is reasonably good, it didn't remind me much of real Mexican cooking.

It's extremely crowded, and other patrons never seem to excuse themselves after pushing on your chair to squeeze through the narrow walkways.

The cocktails were really tasty, and the tequila selection was on point.

The guacamole was good, I liked the fact that it was prepared tableside in a molcajete, though it was under seasoned, or lacking some lime.

The staff were all friendly, and performed very admirably considering how busy it was.

All in all, it was a good experience, but I prefer a quieter atmosphere.
Love this place.  Great food, drinks and atmosphere.
Yum, I'm here with a big group with a set menu. It's been fun - great service too!
Great service, did not eat just had a drink but enjoyed it and atmosphere was great.
I've had a variety of items on their menu and everything has been good. Fav is the tacos, the pork are really good. However, the stools are very uncomfortable to sit on.
Great food, definitely try their house guacamole.
Surprised they don't offer mortgages to cover the bill.food and drinks were good, but not what I would expect for what I paid.

Good drinks with reasonable late night happy hour pries. Accommodating staff as our party grew from 5 to 11. Only annoyance was that the staff were adjusting the lights of the upstairs (where we sat), countless times and we were confused whether they decided to start closing or not (they weren’t).

Great experience! First visit here and it blew me away! Service was Fantastic! They made the Guacamole right at the table. Drinks were tasty. Tequila!!
Great atmosphere! Fun place to be before a hockey game for sure!

The fish tacos and the guacamole here are probably the best ones I’ve had in all of Calgary. Food is amazing, service is also great and the atmosphere is really chill. It’s one of the best places for a get together and catching up with friends. The drink options are decent too. 5/5 would recommend and go again.
Overcrowded . Loud . Small . Minimal selection . Overpriced .
Consistently great. Thank you!
Food is so good!!!
The food was pretty mediocre and the service was pretty poor. I wouldn't go here again.
Great tequila and mezcal menu
Delicious! The tacos are phenomenal and the tequila selection is unbeatable!
Phenomenonal Gauc, and great service
Food is delicious, service quick and friendly! Share the guacamole it's fantastic!

Two stars only because our server hustled his ass! Watched bartenders, hostesses and management stand around and do nothing, and actually laugh at our server, while he booked it while managing several other tables. He even went and asked for help a couple times with zero response. He hustled and delivered with skill on making a couple bowls of guac for us, so much kudos to him! Food was good. Margaritas are over sweetened and if you want to wait over 10 minutes for your drink while you watch the bartender on his phone and making that a priority before making your drinks than this is the place for you! Overall, there's other delicious, outstanding places in the city that care for their guests a lot more than Anejo does. If you're ready to wait and want a full tequila experience then their back bar can definitely deliver. Overall I've been in the restaurant industry and management for over 10 years maybe I'm nitpicking too much but thanks for the reminder once again why I'm disappointed with my experience during every visit.
Excelente guacamole, very good drinks
Amazing food and extremely friendly staff! Always a favorite for me and friends.
My Favourite taco place

Fantastic food and staff.
Amazing drinks and the best guacamole I have had in Calgary!
If you want happiness try the salsa and the guac. Delicious margaritas.  Love it
Get the guac! And the pork belly tacos!

Great tacos!
Great service!
Great decor!

Personally, one of my favourite places in town for fish tacos and guacamole (and I am not a guacamole fan). The tortilla chips can get a little dense so I stick to flour tortillas for my tacos and you cannot go wrong. If you catch their happy hour special, prices are quite fair. Haven’t tried anything else on the menu, but I’d guess it’s pretty good based on the fact I always get the same thing for its deliciousness. Atmosphere can be quite busy later into the night and the staff are all very kind. Ask for the guacamole because they make it fresh in front of you and it’s cool to watch.
Great experience great tacos and margarita
Place is nice but quality of food is not as good as it used to
Great food and service! Wasn't impressed with dessert. The tres leches was good but the tiny squares were definitely not worth what we paid.
The most awesome, knowledgeable and patient staff, great vibe, food is delish. Try the Coconut Chili Margarita!

Poor service + really grumpy server. She seemed inconvenienced by any order we made. Maybe they were just short staffed that night. But regardless the experience only deserves a 2-star experience. Really good drinks though. Food is kind of overrated  there. I much prefer this restaurant's sister location Blanco
Great for our big party and amazing food :-)
The bowl o' meat was excellent. The rest of what we ordered was ok. The smoky taste of the veggie chili in the taco was overpowering so as to make inedible.
Great Happy Hour! Save up your shekels and head over for 1/2 price on some of the most beautiful and unusual  tequila with inside notes and knowledge from the 'tenders and owners of Anejo.
Guacamole!!!!!!

Guacamole was great, margaritas were good but small, main dishes were so-so: chile relleno was ok, veggie tacos were overpoweringly smoky with little other flavor, beans were thick and clumpy with an off taste, but the big bowl of meat was quite good.
Good food good service!

The atmosphere is amazing and the decor is great!  Loved that they make fresh salsa and guacamole tableside as it really adds to the experience however the tacos aren't very authentic Mexican and they tend to use a lot of jalapenos which I personally like but many others can't handle that type of heat. The Cesars were  especially spicy which we kater found out it were pre mixed 🤤 . It is cheap tho and after 9 pm tacos and tequila are on sale but...I've had better.
Good food. Stool seating at tables is a bit uncomfortable.

Really impressed with the food and service here. Dinner was absolutely delicious, with a lots of clean flavour. Service was efficient, and staff were respectful and not over bearing. Would highly recommend.
My favourite Mexican Restaurant! Great menu and AMAZING drinks!
Great selection of tequilas,  average Mexican food and cramped seating. Good place to meet people.

Waited for at least 10 minutes for a seat at the bar, drinks took another 10, servers seemed nice but swamped. Would’ve been nice to experience a better product but our patience was already running slim. Not a great experience for a Bar Manager.
Busy, with excellent drinks and amazing guacamole that they make right at the table. Great experience.

Really cute decor. I love the vibes here. The guacamole is awesome because they make fresh in front of you at your table. That is really neat and reassuring. It definitely could use more lemon/lime though haha. Overall this place is a bit pricey if you're ordering drinks with your meal, but it was tasty for sure. I loved the churros, however the other dessert, spicy chocolate cheesecake or whatever, was disgusting. Highly do NOT recommend that dessert. The cheesecake was crumbly and dry, and it was tiny overall. Definitely not worth the money whatsoever. You're better off getting a cheesecake at Safeway lol. I'm giving 3 star because I was so disappointed in the dessert, and I wouldn't call this place a bang-for-your-buck. But it was good.
Solid tacos and drinks

Pros: Host accommodated us right away, on a busy Saturday night. Shrimp tacos were good, wine was good, guacamole was great! Servers were friendly.
Cons: Loud music, very tight seating to the point our table kept getting bumped into through out dinner and no quesadillas on the menu. I've never been to a Mexican restaurant without that on the menu. Disappointing.
I really expected better. The food was bland.

Fun atmosphere, loud music, good tacos, limited seating, wide range of drinks, over a one hour wait time, friendly staff, bumping into other diners left and right... All in all a nice one-time experience with good food and drinks, but may remain a one-time experience or only for very special occasions.
Started the meal with tortilla chips and guacamole.  The guac was made fresh in front of us and was to die for!   A must order if you eat here. Then had the chorizo and chicken tacos.  👍
Loud but fun atmosphere. Try their happy hour taco specials and their freshly made guacamole- the best!

Hands down one of my favourite restaurants in Calgary. The atmosphere combined with the amazing food has me leaving with a smile every visit. They have more bottles of tequila than you can imagine. Be sure to try their tacos. The chips and guac is always a go to as they prepare it at the table adding to the fun experience. Reservations are recommended specialty in the summer this place gets extremely busy.
You must try guacamole :) I think it's one of the best I've ever eaten...
Great ambience, food is pricey but good. Dessert was laughable. 3 tiny pieces of cake with a blob of gelato for $8.
Great aesthetic, trendy and upbeat. Great food and comprehensive tequila selection, you will not be disappointed. Great for dates and mingling
Excellent authentic style Mexican food. The appetizer guacamole is made custom for you at your table and is fresh and delicious, nearly every table had an order of it when we arrived.

Tequila lovers paradise! I love the selection and that it's served right ( not with salt and lime) - they have the gooooood stuff. Guac is awesome! Friendly service, great ambiance, excellent cocktails.

Great food had the fish tacos, loved them. Had a few specialty drinks very good, prices a high but worth it. Really enjoyed the time there. Small, crowded, loud, but still enjoyable and worth the visit.
One of the best Pork tacos and table side guacamole Ive had!

Stop by today for a drink with a client. Amazing service. Bartenders are very aware of patrons sitting at the bar. If you are looking for something different to drink, other than their amazing margaritas, try out the “el jefe” - fussion drink between an old fashion, and manhattan, with the prime taste of tequila. Must have. Must visit.
So many reasons to visit this place ... But the guacamole and salsa made at your table in lava bowls is the best reason. Oh yah ... And the range of tequila. ;)
Anejo is great for lunch, dinner, or just evening drinks and snacks. Love the guacamole.
Had the margaritas and tacos and both were perfectly made. Guacamole was made fresh at the table and the provided sauces were well picked. Great spot for appetizers or a full meal or just drinks.
Good food

OMG THE GUAC!!! THE GUAAAAAC!!!!! I enjoyed my time here, I went before lunch rush and it was perfect timing, the staff was really friendly, there was plenty of seating. The interior stylist certainly made the place aesthetically pleasing. The food was really good (beef tacos for me) and the guacamole was really amazing. Parking is along the road so it depends on the time of day for availability (again, plenty during the time I went) Did I mention the guac?
There used to be a server there in the summer named Alexa. She was always so funny. Really made going here a lot of fun.
Great specials, great gluten free options.
Very good food amd good service
Always good food here. The guacamole is the best.

I was very excited to try this restaurant and I was not disappointed. The tacos were simple and fantastic. I'd recommend the pork belly tacos. Also, the margaritas are so damn tasty! They have many different flavours which are fun to try.
Went for a quick drink and appetizer while kids were at swim lessons. So impressive. Speed of service was excellent and the guacamole is a must have.
Best tequila in town
Not a huge fan, ambiance is about the only great thing here. Food and drink is average.
Excellent food and atmosphere. Have goodies many, many times and have never been disappointed. The guacamole is the best I've had in the city!
Love the Guacamole made fresh at the table!!

I had high expectations for this resturaunt after hearing positive reviews from friends, but was dissapointed in the end.
The good: amazing chips and guac - they were so good
Decent service -not amazing but also they were serving a full restaurant
Cool decorations

The bad: i ordered the tiliapia tacos and was disappointed to find that the tacos tasted plain and like cardboard
While my guest ordered chicken mole and found it dry and barely any flavour
Awsome during Happy Hour

I love this place. Amazing tequila menue. Great food and service. I previously had them rated as a 4 star but i'm lowering rating as they removed my favourite dish from thwir menue... Was a cutting board with meets and trimings servied with tortias and hot sauces... Rwal shame they took it of as almost everything on the plater is in another dish?
Fanastic atmosphere and tacos! They also make the guacomole right at your table. They also have classy margharitas.
Still our favourite place in the whole city. I have recently had to switch to gluten sensitive options and the corn tortillas allow me to have the tacos while still being mindful.
Lovely, cozy and ambient. Delicious food and cocktails.

I love this place! Cool decor, amazing food and some of the best tequila cocktails I've ever had! All 3 times I've been, my server has been charming and knowledgeable. Highly recommend, especially to tequila lovers.
Best guac and in the city!
Food is great, and location is good too. Cocktails were a surprise and quite tasty. Service is hit or miss.
Very expensive, service was good, good was nothing great

The tacos are decent, the guac and Margaritas are amazing. If you are booking a group, I absolutely recommend to not sit at the long table. The seats are so uncomfortable... Literally painful. And the tables wobbles so much.
Table side guacamole is delicious!
Not impressed.
We felt rushed the while time there. Our food came out so quick we had no time to relax and enjoy our night out.  Food was not very good.
Meh. I can't really say much more. Food is underwhelming, but the price isn't. Not the best balance. Drinks are also pretty expensive. Nice for the experience, but not a place I'd ever go back to
Drinks, food and service are amazing. Waitress suggested a few meals based on our preferences which we really enjoyed!
Went for a friend's birthday. That food was amazing (had the mole chicken), delicious margaritas and drinks. Overall a fantastic place for dinner and drinks, looking forward to going again!
Mind blowing,fantastic
Best Manhattans ever!
Fantastic restaurant, step right into a funky cool atmosphere, relaxing, laughing with friends and family, enjoying delicious spicy Mexican food while tasting specialty tequilas.

Food was amazing. Portion sizes are large. At first it seemed a little pricey but once our meals came and we had a couple of margaritas it was worth every penny. Service was excellent as well. Highly recommended this restuarant.

A little pricey but the guacamole is amazing, happy hour in my opinion is the best time to go.
You should also try the mango margarita 👌
What's not to love
The guacamole is delicious, it is not pricey and the place is really nice. However, it is really noisy (even if you sit upstairs). We will come back for the food ;)
Really good food we went for breakfast, the huevos rancheros were delicious and the flavor of the churros couldn't be more authentic

Quality has gone down significantly. Ordered 6 tacos, one of them they forgot to include the meat all together. Even with the resto being busy, food came out cold. Avacods in the guacamole were not freshest I have seen...

We are regulars here at anejo, the food is always top notch, the servers are always chipper and upbeat, the drinks are delicious and creative - we will continue to bring our friends, family and co-workers as everything remains consistent with quality.
Food is awesome, but can get pricey if you like to eat a lot:)
Great vibe with some fun food options. Margaritas are great too!
Decent, but better can be found for cheaper. Pork belly and chorizo were disappointing, chimichurri steak was good. Service could be improved, but we may have fallen victim to a new server.
Ahi tuna tacos were great. Everything else was a flop.
Delicious tacos. Mediocre service.

Stopped by for drinks and appies on a Friday night @9:30. The place wasn't too crowded - there were a couple of larger groups but for the most part there was lots of room. The drinks (we tried a couple of different magaritas) were amazing - served in short glasses rather than the usual margarita glass. The guacamole was made table-side and was incredible. The service was wonderful - we were checked on constantly and all the staff members were courteous. Would recommend and would return.
Friendly stuff. Tasty food and amazing Margaritas.
Tacos are perfect at happy hour
Beautiful place, food is amazing and drinks sooo many to try.
Best chili coconut margaritas!

Really really good food and drinks, but expect to spend money! For groups larger than 10 you have to preorder a set menu which honestly is a huge hassle, so keep that in mind when looking at this venue for a birthday dinner.

I love Mexican food and drink. So much that friends and family reminded me on numerous occasions to check out Anejo's tequila bar.

As I have frequented many Mexican/TexMex restaurants throughout North America, I am admittedly a bit of a food snob when it comes to this type of food.

Calgary has traditionally suffered average Mexican food. Anejo has unfortunately not raised our city's average grade on Mexican food - only on good tequila selection.

Although the urban hipsters were amazed by gaucamole prepared table-side, more experienced Mexican food lovers would likely agree that Anejo's food is very average. The guacamole was indeed good, but the meats were really dry and the portions were small given the price. Excluding the guacamole, nothing on the food side to rave about.

The tequila selection is excellent and the chili coconut margarita was outstanding.

Now comes the bad parts. The service was awful and the temperature had to be 25-26 degrees inside. We ate in the (very loud) lounge which was a mistake. The bartenders and servers spent way too much time talking with their "bro's", serving them complimentary tequila shots rather than being concerned about our third request to get ice in our table waters.

This will likely be a food favourite for Millennials wanting table-side guac, shooting Patron, and bro-hugging the staff with cool tats.

I will likely keep on searching for good Mexican in Calgary.
The service is fantastic.   The food is great if you like everything spicy.  I'm not big on spice so that's why I gave it 3 stars.  Great atmosphere.
Great environment and selection.  Cliff was amazingly knowledgeable and friendly. FOOD WAS FRESH!
Great atmosphere, fun drinks(el jafe),  good food!
Delicious food, tasteful decor, vibrant ambience
Best tacos and tequila in the city.

Fan-freaking-tastic!!
Of your looking for authentic Mexican cuisine, this is it.
Definitely a great place for drinks at the bar with amazing bar staff.
They make the guacamole in front of you so you can't get fresher than that!
Always a great, fun experience! Love the staff and food :)
Great tequila collection and great food. Awesome service and they explain us on the different varieties of tequila and share valuable suggestions. Bit crowded and noisy..
Good drinks, mediocre food, too expensive for what it is
Such an amazing place! Amazing food, great staff and really cool atmosphere.
The appetizers and drinks are great. The server that we had seemed miserable but overall I would go back.
The tacos were amazing and the tequila list was quite impressive

We used to love this place so much but the last experiences were highly disappointing. The guacamole is not as good as it used to be. It was so spicy I could barely taste the other ingredients. And I know the Mexican food is supposed to be spicy. I had to eventually order one more piece of avocado to mix it with. The margarita tasted like it did not have tequila at all. Their pork tacos are still very good.

In the middle of a long walk we stopped for a patio guacamole snack. The guacamole, made fresh at our table, was really delicious: flavorful and tangy. The service, however, was lackluster. First, it took forever for the guacamole to come out; second, after a long wait for the bill I eventually had to go inside and chase someone down to pay. If the restaurant was busy I could understand the waits, but it was, in fact, quite empty.

The place is nice, good and friendly service. But no good option for vegetarians. Ordered Tacos and Chille Rellenos. Came with same kinda filling of corn, beans and tomatoes.
Not a place for vegetarians.
Because Tequila!
Good food good vibes
Alright place. $5/🌮 as of 07/2017
Great food and Great customer service,Would come back for sure . Fast service even during busy hours.
Fresh guacamole made on the spot, smooth tequila and lively atmosphere during the stampede!
Super overpriced (even during Happy Hour). Food was okay but nothing special. Small portion sizes. Be prepared to spend a good amount of money here if you want to be full.
Get in on that guacamole. Have a drink while you're at it.

The place itself is good; great food and drinks. However it was unbelievably hot; no AC, no fans, no source of cool air except for your own hand fanning yourself with a menu. It made for a very uncomfortable night. I would come back in the winter!
Expensive but amazing food!

The place was a sweat box, the atmosphere was way to loud, the food was stuff i could make at home, and the portions, tiny.

The price for what I would consider appetizer sized portions, 60$...the food was so unfilling I felt the urge to go get five guys burgers fries and milkshake afterwards (and i am not an over eater, the portions are legitimately that tiny), if you want a fantastic meal, go there instead!

I was so disappointed in this place i doubt i will ever go back.

1/10 will NOT do again :(
You have to go for happy hour which is every day. Delicious and cheap margaritas and tacos
The bomb
Great service, accommodating staff, good food, and better drinks
It's definitely pricey, but worth it! Great service, many hands and all eager to assist. Great margaritas!
Amazing food. Great selection of tequila. Table side guacamole is a must. Small patio but great spot if you can get a seat.

GREAT TEAM GREAT SERVICE GREAT FOOD AND DRINK

I love going here to chill on the patio or at the bar,  the Guacamole is amazing done to your taste in front of you.  The Taco's always 100%.  The drinks well . . . I love them.  Personally I go for a martini,  But I do like the marg's as well.

From the moment you arrive at the door until you leave the team takes care of you. Friendly, knowledgable service.   Go you will  not be disappointed

So tonight I am leaving Añejo Restaurant there are three ladies standing outside, they asked me "is the food good?"

I said yes, the Guac is amazing, the taco's great, have never been disappointed with anything. You should try it out, Trust me. .

Then they asked me, "What did you have"

Me: A martini.
Amazing margaritas and tacos.
Happy hour is the best with all your favourite Tequilas available
Best place for happy hour, not worth it during non happy hour

The food here, is AWESOME, the drinks are soooo good (I literally can't pick a favourite margarita, because they're all so tasty)
but its all a bit ruined by their staff. They all seem like they hate their life, and are all rude. I've been here a handful of times and 4/5 times the service was abysmal. (I will say one server we had one time was very nice!)
The ambience is awesome too, they just need some major customer service workshops or something.
Friends said the meat from the tacos tasted like it was from a can. I agree, it was quite dry. We tried the chicken, pork and da beef. Guac was gucci tho.
Great food, better drinks. Service can be a little slow, but still highly recommend.
Great tacos, tequila, and atmosphere
Incredible food.  Great service.  Awesome ambiance.
Fun, exciting place to start the night off with some drinks and snack. Mezcalrita is unbelievable and deadly.

Great service. Difficult for larger groups without reservations. I highly recommend reserving ahead of time. The happy hour is great (3 to 5). Although at times the quality of the tacos can be a bit inconsistent. The tequila selection though is incredible. Atmosphere is great. It's an awesome place to start the evening off. Tequila and tacos... you can't go wrong.

I can see why people would choose to drink here, but the food menu is overpriced when you consider both serving size and taste... I'm surprised by the overwhelmingly positive reviews on here. The tacos were disappointing, and were served with a few measly strands of cabbage slaw. The service was slow and by the time the hot sauces were delivered to our table (three of us ordered tacos) two of us had finished our meals. Looking forward to finding a more authentic-tasting Mexican restaurant in Calgary.
Great food
I like going to anejo during their happy hour as I think their prices are pretty high. I love the atmosphere and the drinks :)
Gotta go during happy hour for tacos. They are so good and the guac is amazing. White sauce for the tacos is a must.
Great place for food and drinks

Only went for some drinks, on a Saturday night, it was packed but seating was quick.
Great service, and I was surprised that their Old fashioned drink was good. Made with tequila which made me worry, but it was still pretty good !
Great choice of tequilas, busy place
Above average mexican food. Not amazing.
Food was rather average, seating was very tight, and everything seems rushed
Awesome specials, very good selection of tequila. Bar stools are very uncomfortable but table seats are more than okay.
Amazing food, great service, tequila galore - stop reading this and go check it out for yourself!

If your idea of Mexican food is Taco Bell, this probably isn't the place for you. Food is more authentic (real meat, cheese, spice, cilantro, etc) and is very good! Fresh guacamole made at the table is a popular order. There are 2 drink menus, one for mixed drinks (margaritas, cocktails, etc) and one for tequilas/mezcal. The servers were friendly and very good with assisting with selection of tequila/mezcal for the adventurous, but service for our large group on this visit was lacking (half of the table consistently was forgotten about and we had to chase down the server multiple times to make an order). Because of the large group, gratuity was automatically added to our bills, but given the poor service half of us got, we spoke to the manager about it. He was not rude at all and happy to at least give a free round of shots to make up for it, and the gesture was good enough for us! This is a very popular restaurant, especially on weekends, so the place fills right up and the atmosphere is very loud but fun.

Highly recommend! I often frequent this establishment for a night out with friends. The guacamole is a must and is made right at the table in front of you. Nice atmosphere as well. Upstairs seating is preferred (less noisy).
friendly staff

Their new summer 2017 menu has many of their classics and a few new dishes. The Anejo flavour and freshness is still in every dish. Their halfy appy hour between 3 & 5 is still the best deal in town. Try their feature margaritas and their new braise tuna tacos!
Great food. a must visit  place
Fantastic drinks and food! Always go back for the tacos and the margaritas!
Great drinks and amazing tacos. Server was really nice and made great recommendations!

Honestly, this is the most overpriced restaurant I've had the displeasure visiting. They sell Mexican food... think about it, in what universe is a simple taco worth $10+??? The food tasted just okay, not great, so I cannot possibly justify the premium. Place seems busy though, so perhaps there're enough people who would buy the pre-dirtied Nordstrom jeans for $465 so they could show them off over dinner at anejos.

PS the owner is a genius for getting away with basically highway robbery.
Delicious margarritas and good happy hour.

I can honestly say this was the worst restaurant meal I've had in some time. Ordered the basa tacos - the tacos were like cardboard and the fish appeared to be deep fried a number of times. It was served with a little wilted red cabbage. Totally tasteless. The only saving grace for the meal was the margueritas - delicious.
Very nice place for group events
Love the tequila and tacos

The last time I saw this many skulls i was digging through my great uncle's war time chest. Truth be told we all suspected he was up to no good but he spoke about the Germans with such detest we just naturally assumed he was on the side of the good guys but I think we're all starting to question that. It's not like those skulls we found were any particular type beyond "generic human" but still, you have to assume a good person doesn't hold onto skulls or own so many gold plated coins with eagles on them.

In conclusion, I have a lot of unanswered questions. The guacamole was amazing and I loved my coconut chili margarita.
Amazing
Drinks great.   The food, especially the tacos are rubbish.
It was loud and dark but there was cool decor. The food was good:)
A fresh new take on Salsa, mixed at your table and a new recipe for fresh, fantastic tacos!

We came just for a drink and had about 5 or 6. The selection is incredible, and the staff is knowledgeable. Sitting at the bar is to be desired because the chairs are not very comfortable. Although the bartenders are great and are very entertaining. I can't wait to go back for food.
Pork belly tacos...nuff said!
Pricey but tasty

Came here for Big Taste Calgary. The table side guac is a bit of a novelty while the rest of the food was just OK. Had some protein that was served in a super heated rock bowl and while the presentation was beautiful, unless you ate it all immediately it just kept cooking and over-cooking the meat.
Love the Saturday afternoon special!
The guacamole is amazing . The tacos are really good too especially the ahi tuna, I wish the kept that on the menu year round.

Ah! Home of the famed "smashed-in-front-of-you" guacamole. Nothing beats that! And the other dishes also equally delicious and authentic. It can definitely get loud but that makes it feel all the more immersive.

Mediocre at best, the food is ok but everything is very overpriced. $7.50 for a can of beer is a bit ridiculous, when that's what a bottle is nearly anywhere else. The guacamole being made fresh is a nice touch, but the mains taste bland and portions are small for being $25. Los Chilitos is hands down a better restaurant for taste, atmosphere and value!
Awesome food. Great drinks. Even better service. Highly recommend!
Amazing food, drinks, and ambience.
Good location great drinks and mediocre tacos. Very busy.

Great place for margaritas and tacos! LOVE their habanero mayo and the great selection of tequila!! Always a lively atmosphere-- be sure to have resos or you will be waiting a long long time for a table during their peak hours. Service has always been great. It's one of those places that you can go to and have a decent meal, even if you're on a diet. Fair value for price point.
The guacamole is awesome!
Waaaay too loud and cramped.
My favorite margarita all time is from here: Coconut-Chili...you must must must try it!
Authentic mexican taste, the burritos, beans take you to the world of mexicans. A lot of options available for drinks.
Great food. Great latout. Loved it
Second time we have been here. Great food, Great drinks and a great atmosphere.
My favourite Mexican in the city! Love the Chili Coconut Margaritas and all the food is amazing!
Absolutely amazing Mexican food. Definitely on the pricey side, but this goes way beyond tacos ad burritos. Chili-coconut margarita is a must try
Half price tacos are my fave but shhhh don't tell anyone
The guacamole is a must try
Literally had the best time today. Missed our servers name but he was unreal. Hilarious human. The food was great and the margaritas make up for the snow fall! Loved it! Check it out. Great vibes.
Too crowded,  food is not very good nor Mexican Latin tasting,  good tequila though and great atmosphere!!  Parking sucks big time!!!
Great guacamole made at your table, very good tacos and fun atmosphere.
Great for quick lunch and happy hour.  Friendly staff.
Great atmosphere.  Helpful staff. Drinks are good but the food is only alright.
Always a good meal, and great margaritas!
Spicy margarita is awesome
Guacamole was good.  Meals are decently good.  A bit expensive for what you get but  trendy
I like the guacamole!!!

Food and drinks tasted great but were very overpriced. Service was awesome as well. Would recommend but not if you are expecting large portions of food. A small margarita (we tried 2 different specialty ones which tasted great) was over priced for how tiny the glass was. Finished in 2 sips, easy. Pork belly tacos were great, classic tacos are tiny.
Always the best service! Excellent food (guacamole to die for) - perfectly cooked and high quality. Busy for a reason!

I want to give 4.5/5 but Google reviews only does full stars. We were here for a late lunch, and service was fast and attentive. The food is great, a top notch rendition of Mexican food; you won't find heaps of cheap beans and rice here. Just an honest and well done interpretation of traditional and new style Mexican with fresh ingredients and solid flavours. The chicharonnes are a must try.

What really sells this place is the drinks; probably the best selection of tequila and mescal in Calgary. Their margaritas and cocktails are grand, and they do tequilas of the week. Worth a try just to see the day-of-the-dead decore.

Quality drinks, amazing food, and service to match! The manager Simon, the bartender Adan were both friendly and helpful in a very busy venue. They had the ability to make my group feel taken care of when time was a valuable resource.

Guacamole was fresh and fantastic, the tacos were all flavourful and a total delight.

I had the mezcalita on the recommendation of a friend, a great cocktail worth giving a try.

Would definitely recommend to anyone looking for a fun, vibrant atmosphere, and a quality experience.

I have never had a bad meal at this restaurant. The reviews are right, it is tight seating but that does not really bother me. It has a great atmosphere. The service is friendly and the food always tastes fresh. They have an amazing selection of Tequila which is usually not my thing but I have tried some and they actually are delicious.
Great atmosphere and tasty food but the prices were quite high for the portions we received.
Incredible and unique food!
Loved the food and service!
The absolute largest collection of tequila I have ever seen. They make the Guac right in front of you and the cheese dip in their appetisers was amazing.
Great option for happy hour with a group! Guacamole is a must, and the margaritas are awesome!
Awesome happy hour specials. The service is always slow so be prepared for that. Their margaritas are great and have unique flavours.
Guacamole is the bomb.

If you've got a hankering for Margarhitas and Mexican quizine,  this is definitely one of the best spots in Calgary to satisfy your cravings. Right in the mission district of Calgary,  this charming restaurant has a well rounded menu of what seem like very authentic Mexican food and drinks, and a lively atmosphere. Portions are generous,  food is fresh,  and the guacamole made right at your table is a nice touch.

If you don't mind a bit of spice, try the Chilli Lime Coconut Margarhita -  it's surprisingly delicious (the kind of drink you can't wait to have again the next time you visit)
Great food. Ok price. But will with a visit. Try the guacamole.
Awesome selection of tacos, great service.
Tequila flights and great atmosphere!!

Ordered guacamole and they came out with a knife and raw ingredients, then cut it up in front of us - im here to eat tacos not supervise food prep. It was very awkward and violent. Then, a Rastafarian passing by told my girlfriend women talk too much. Personally, I think they reassigning the guacamole presenter to a security position would solve both problems.
A late night favorite.  Must enjoy the guacamole made at your table
Good Food/Service. Pretty busy place
Gourmet Mexican. Trendy place. Big tequila menu
really good guacamole
Great food and drinks.
Great Tacos. The quick lunch special is perfect and a good value.
This was my first time at Añejo, and I'm disappointed. Hostess was rude, looking up and down me and my husband, the staff were not friendly at all.
Great food, however drinks are rediculously expensive. $17 for a double Margarita with house tequila? Get real. Rude surprise on the ole bill. And here I thought Calgary was in a recession.
Amazing taco and tequila spot. Great in the evenings for casual drinks with friends also. The pitchers of margaritas are fabulous for a group.

I have been aware of this place for quite some time but had not made it out till today.  I try to make it a habit of trying a place during their specials.  I was not disappointed to say the least.  Their daily halfy hour is well worth the visit if you can spare the time.  Started with their avarage tacos.  Quite lovely.  Stepping up the game though I went with the crispy pork belly and yes.  All of the yes.  I will be back before long.  Happy hour or not
Love this place! Great service and amazing food. Cheap happy hour tacos and drinks everyday from 3-5. Great place for groups.
Food was ok, extremely loud, and I'm pretty sure I witnessed the owner flirting with several women independently while we are a few tables away
I will challenge  the chef to a dual one day.
Excellent fresh food and atmosphere
great staff, great food
It isn't Mexico, but sure takes second place. Great food and excellent service!
Great food! Try the guacamole dip, it's made at your table, right in front of you!
The food is good but very pricey for what you get. The venue is also very loud at times. If you plan on getting tacos, spend the extra on the premium tacos because the regular ones are plain.
Great restaurant!
Food was the best. Drinks were the best. Service was the best. Amanda is the best.
